description.zh:
可实现复杂决策及自主控制，
是尖端设备必不可少的核心部件。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_04|/>」制作。
description.en:
A core component essential to cutting-edge devices, enabling complex decision-making and autonomous control.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_04|/>.

description.zh:
帕鲁驯养师的眼镜。
装备者无法将攻击对象的生命值降低到1以下。
戴上可以确认帕鲁的隐藏才能。
description.en:
Eyewear for Pal Tamers. 
The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1. 
Reveals hidden Pal potentials.

description.zh:
和平主义者的戒指。
装备该戒指者无法将攻击对象的生命值降低到1以下。
description.en:
Pacifist's ring.
The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

Displays Health, Attack and Defense stats on a scale of 0 to 100.

description.zh:
能够额外携带物品的小背包。
持有此道具时，可增加背包栏位。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A small pouch that allows you to carry additional items. 
Holding it increases your inventory slots.
Carrying one is enough.

持有此道具时，可增加背包栏位。
只需携带一个就足够了。

A modest pouch that allows you to carry additional items.

Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
极为罕见的魔法果实。
据说帕鲁吃下后会对人类敞开心扉。
务必谨慎选择赠送对象。
description.en:
A rarely seen magical fruit.
It is said that a Pal who eats it will open 
its heart to humans.
Choose carefully which Pal you give it to.

description.zh:
饱含温情的小小果实。
据说帕鲁吃下后会对人类敞开心扉。
务必谨慎选择赠送对象。
description.en:
A small fruit filled with kindness.
It is said that a Pal who eats it will open 
its heart to humans.
Choose carefully which Pal you give it to.

description.zh:
用<itemName id=|SkyislandIngot|/>打造的古代铠甲。
失落文明的精髓毫无保留地注入其中，具备压倒性的防御力。
即使是导致世界末日的威胁，也能坦然面对的究极防具。
description.en:
Ancient armor forged from <itemName id=|SkyislandIngot|/>.
Crafted with the essence of a lost civilization, it boasts overwhelming defensive power and is capable of withstanding cataclysmic threats.

description.zh:
经过改良的<itemName id=|AncientArmor|/>。
利用古代技术进一步提高了防寒性能，在严寒环境下也能保存体力。
description.en:
Refined <itemName id=|AncientArmor|/>.
Its cold resistance has been further enhanced using ancient technology, allowing the wearer to maintain their strength even in extreme cold regions.

防御能力远远凌驾于现代的装备。
description.en:
An ancient helmet forged from <itemName id=|SkyislandIngot|/>.
It is imbued with wisdom passed down through the ages, protecting its wearer with unwavering strength.
Its defensive capabilities far surpass those of modern equipment.

description.zh:
用<itemName id=|SkyislandIngot|/>打造的古代头盔。
其中凝聚着历经岁月锤炼的智慧，能为穿戴者提供坚不可摧的保护。
防御能力远远凌驾于现代的装备。

description.zh:
存在于古代科技中的核心。 
在现在的帕洛斯群岛早已无迹可寻， 
里面满载着被遗忘的睿智。
description.en:
Core from technology that was lost long ago.
Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

description.zh:
记载于帕鲁皮上的古代文书。
帕鲁远征时偶尔可能带回。
是进行研究时不可或缺的道具。
description.en:
An ancient manuscript written on Pal hide. It may be found by Pals during expeditions. 
Required for advancing research.

description.zh:
书上写着失落的古代技术。
使用后，可获得古代科技点。
description.en:
A book that contains long-lost secrets of technology from a forgotten era.
Use it to obtain Ancient Technology Points.

弓射击时用的<itemName id=|Arrow|/>。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Arrow|/>s for use with bows.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

description.zh: 弓射击时用的。 可以对敌人造成伤害。 可在「」制作。
description.en: s for use with bows. Deals damage on contact. Can be crafted at .

弓射击时用的<itemName id=|Arrow_Poison|/>。
可以对敌人造成<uiCommon id=|ADDITIONAL_EFFECT_Poison| style=|Effect_Poison|/>伤害。

<itemName id=|Arrow_Poison|/>s for use with bows. 
Afflicts target with <uiCommon id=|ADDITIONAL_EFFECT_Poison| style=|Effect_Poison|/> on contact.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|AssaultRifle_Default1|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_02|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|AssaultRifle_Default1|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_02|/>.

description.zh:
以压倒性的连射能力镇压敌人的<itemName id=|AssaultRifle_Default1|/>。
火力优秀，是与强敌对战时的首选。
description.en:
An <itemName id=|AssaultRifle_Default1|/> that mows down enemies with overwhelming force. 
It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.

description.zh:
装食物的小口袋。
会开放1个自动进食专用的食物栏位。
饥饿时会自动消耗栏位内的食物。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A small pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks a food slot in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
装食物的普通口袋。
自动进食专用的食物栏位会开放到2个。
饥饿时会自动消耗栏位内的食物。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A decently sized pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks 2 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
装食物的大口袋。
自动进食专用的食物栏位会开放到3个。
饥饿时会自动消耗栏位内的食物。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A large pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks 3 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
装食物的特大口袋。
自动进食专用的食物栏位会开放到3个。
饥饿时会自动消耗栏位内的食物。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A extra-large pouch for holding food. 
Unlocks 4 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
装食物的最大号口袋。
自动进食专用的食物栏位会开放到5个。
饥饿时会自动消耗栏位内的食物。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
An enormous pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 5 food slots in your inventory. 
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
砍树用的斧子。
以帕鲁金属制造，使其获得惊人的锋利度。
即使是极限环境下生长的优质硬木，用它也能轻松砍伐。
description.en:
An axe for chopping wood. 
It has achieved extraordinary sharpness thanks to Pal Metal. 
It can slice through high-grade trees from the harshest regions without trouble.

description.zh:
砍树用的斧子。
因为是石头做的，感觉不怎么锋利。
description.en:
An axe for cutting wood.
Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

description.zh:
砍树用的斧子。
以金属制成，砍起硬木头时‌称手很多。
砍伐生长在大陆深处的粗壮树木也不在话下。
description.en:
An axe for cutting wood. 
Made from metal, it chops through Hardwood with ease, making it useful for harvesting sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent.

description.zh:
砍树用的斧子。
耐久度与锋利度均有更进一步的提升。
可用于砍伐生长在严苛环境的良木，获得坚硬的木材。
description.en:
An axe for cutting wood. 
Made from high quality metal, its sharpness and durability has improved even further. 
It can harvest Hardwood from sturdy trees that grow in unforgiving lands.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Axe4

description.zh:
在<itemName id=|Pan|/>中夹入了培根，<itemName id=|Lettuce|/>，<itemName id=|Tomato|/>的菜肴。
食用后一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +15%。
description.en: A dish where bacon, <itemName id=|Lettuce|/>, <itemName id=|Tomato|/> are sandwiched in <itemName id=|Pan|/>. Consumption increases <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +15% for a while.

description.zh:
熏烤的培根风味搭配上鸡蛋的柔和口感，
共同谱出了完美的和谐之曲。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/>+10%
description.en:
The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly
with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
肉本身就含有香草和野莓的香味，
经过烤制后更是口感浓厚。
能为野外用餐增添温暖与满足感。
description.en:
Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of
herbs and berries embedded in the meat.
Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

description.zh:
用豪迈的直火烤制而成的猪肉。
外皮酥脆，内里多汁。
是非常适合宴会的豪华料理。
description.en:
Boar grilled over a hearty flame.
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside.
Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

description.zh:
用炭火慢烤而制的鸡肉串烧。
口感轻盈且味道清爽。
description.en:
Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire.
Light and refreshing on the tongue.

description.zh:
仔细煎制而成的大块牛排。
强烈且浓郁的风味能为食用者带来活力。
description.en:
Thick, well-done steak.
Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

description.zh:
经过精心炙烤的鹿肉保有细腻风味，
并散发出浓郁的森林香气。
这般优雅的滋味能让生活更加丰富多彩。
description.en:
Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes,
accented by the aromas of the deep forest.
Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

description.zh:
饱含展翅高飞时的活力，
强劲力量满溢而出的烧鸟。
description.en: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

description.zh:
极具威严感的浓郁风味。
每一口都能勾起深林与冰河的回忆。
description.en:
Boasts a rich and dignified flavor.
Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

description.zh:
炭火慢烤而成的肉排。
外皮焦香四溢，内里软嫩多汁，入口即化。
其中的特殊成分锁住了鲜味，实乃风味出众且便于保存的佳品。
description.en:
Charcoal-grilled to perfection, this steak offers a crispy exterior and melt-in-your-mouth juiciness. 
Unique compounds seal in flavor and enhance shelf life.

description.zh:
冰鹿的肉具有从火中取出后，
温度会急速下降并保持新鲜的特性。
非常适合作为应急食品。
description.en:
When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature.
This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time,
making it a perfect emergency ration.

description.zh:
用炭火烤制而成的新鲜鱼肉，
能带出松软肥嫩的口感。
description.en:
Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire.
Plump and juicy.

description.zh:
涂上秘制酱汁后烤制而成、
能治愈全身心的美味烤鱼。
非常适合疲惫的帕鲁驯养师食用。
description.en:
Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce.
Soothes both mind and body.
Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

description.zh:
能够品尝到野生的王者风味的大块烤肉。
浓缩的肉汁精华从骨头中溢出，
大口咬下时虽嚼劲十足，但内部却出奇地鲜嫩。
description.en:
Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds.
Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone,
making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

description.zh:
用香料将羊肉腌制入味后烤制而成的美食。
可感受到强烈的特色以及极具深度的风味。
description.en:
Spiced and roasted mutton.
Deeply complex with unique flavors.

description.zh:
烤熟后营养价值上升的蘑菇。
不可思议的是还很有饱足感。
description.en:
Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value.
Curiously, it's also quite filling.

description.zh:
经过烘烤后，营养价值更高了。
不可思议的是还很有饱足感。
description.en:
Cooking enhances their nutritional value,
and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
用于近距离战斗的<itemName id=|Bat|/>。
也许能够用来打倒小型帕鲁。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|Bat|/> for close range combat.
Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

description.zh:
这根棒球棒也能用于近距离战斗。
但拿帕鲁当球可能有点太大了。
description.en:
Baseball bat for close-range combat.
Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

description.zh:
可以近距离攻击的<itemName id=|Bat3|/>。
看谁不顺眼，上去就是一顿扁。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|Bat3|/> that works well in close combat. 
Use it to beat down anyone you don't like.

description.zh:
单人挑战竞技场并获胜后即可获得。
收集一定数量后可兑换豪华奖品。
description.en:
Earned by winning solo matches in the arena. 
Collect enough and you can trade them for special rewards.

description.zh:
能发射高精度光束，引发大范围连锁爆炸的发射器。
连射时要注意防止枪体过热。
description.en:
Fires a high-density beam that causes explosions over a wide area.
Caution is required to prevent overheating during rapid fire.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|BeamLauncher|/>使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|AncientWorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|BeamLauncher|/>.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|AncientWorkBench|/>.

description.zh:
近战用的<itemName id=|BeamSword|/>。
高能激光可瞬间融断敌人。
description.en:
<itemName id=|BeamSword|/> for close-range combat.
Slices through opponents, burning them with a high-output laser.

description.zh:
在极限环境下历经岁月洗礼的风化兽骨。
即使失去了肉体，仍然放射出强大的存在感。
description.en:
A beast bone weathered over many years in extreme environments.
Even after losing its flesh, it still gives off a strong presence.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Beer

description.zh:
不论生吃还是烤熟都很美味的万能食材。
走在岛上随处可见。
description.en:
A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked.
They can be found anywhere on the island.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Berries|/>的种子。
是建造农园的必要物品。
可在采取<itemName id=|Berries|/>时获得。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Berries|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be obtained when picking <itemName id=|Berries|/>.

description.zh:
可将生物能源转化为电力并存储的装置。
用于驱动需要较高能量密度的机器。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>」制作。
description.en:
A device that stores bio-energy as electrical power.
Used for equipment requiring high energy density.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

description.zh:
用帕鲁身上提取的特殊成分制作的高效冷却介质。
用于控制大功率设备的温度。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>」制作。
description.en:
A high-efficiency cooling medium made from special components derived from Pals.
Used to regulate temperature in high-output devices.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

description.zh:
持有此设计图，即可解锁「<itemName id=|Accessory_AT_1|/>
（<uiCommon id=|RARITY_RARE|/>）」的配方。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>」制作。
description.en:

(<uiCommon id=|RARITY_RARE|/>).
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>.

names.zh: 佐伊的万圣节服装设计图

description.zh:
偷听到佐伊自言自语后记下的笔记。
在工作台上制作，并把成品交给佐伊吧。
description.en:
A memo of Zoe's mutterings.
Craft it at a workbench and deliver the finished piece to her.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的<itemName id=|Bone|/>。
是优质的钙素材。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Bone|/> collected from Pals.
A valuable source of premium calcium.

description.zh:

description.zh:
通缉犯的讨伐证明。
将其上交给村落或城镇的自卫队，
即可兑换赏金。
description.en:
A token of having defeated a bounty target.
By giving it to a Vigilante Bounty Officer in villages or towns, it can be exchanged for a reward.

description.zh:
不用使劲即可射出<itemName id=|Arrow|/>。
虽然填装很费时，但可使出强劲一击。
description.en:
Fires an <itemName id=|Arrow|/> effortlessly.
Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot.

description.zh:
可造成<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire|/>伤害的<itemName id=|BowGun|/>。
利用火箭让帕鲁着火，变得更容易捕捉。
需要「<itemName id=|Arrow_Fire|/>」才能使用。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|BowGun|/> that deals <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire|/> damage.
Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture.
Requires <itemName id=|Arrow_Fire|/>.

Poisoned Pals are easier to capture.

description.zh:
改良后的弓，可同时发射5支箭。
拥有不可思议的力量，每次射击只消耗1支<itemName id=|Arrow|/>。
description.en:
An enhanced bow that allows five arrows to be fired simultaneously.
By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single <itemName id=|Arrow|/> when fired.

description.zh:
可造成<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire|/>伤害的弓。
利用火箭让帕鲁着火，变得更容易捕捉。
需要「<itemName id=|Arrow_Fire|/>」才能使用。
description.en:
A bow that deals <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire|/> damage.
Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture.
Requires <itemName id=|Arrow_Fire|/>.

description.zh:

帕鲁中毒以后，会变得更容易捕捉。
需要「<itemName id=|Arrow_Poison|/>」才能使用。
description.en:
Frightening bow that poisons its target.
Poisoned Pals are easier to capture.
Requires <itemName id=|Arrow_Poison|/>.

description.zh:
改良后的弓，可同时发射3支箭。
拥有不可思议的力量，每次射击只消耗1支<itemName id=|Arrow|/>。
description.en:
An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously.
By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single <itemName id=|Arrow|/> when fired.

description.zh:
近距离战斗用的剑。锋利程度不容小觑！
但需要靠近敌人攻击，相当危险。
description.en:
A sword for close-range combat. 
Not bad for a battered sword. 
Perfect for getting up close and personal.

description.zh:
庆祝时会食用的料理。
如果将它放入<mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/>的箱子里，
吃了它后的帕鲁会充满活力并产下帕鲁蛋。
description.en:
A dish eaten during celebrations. 
Put it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

description.zh:
如果将它放入<mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/>的箱子里，
吃了它后的帕鲁会充满活力并产下帕鲁蛋。
由此诞生的帕鲁的潜力值会更容易稍微上升。
description.en:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

description.zh:
如果将它放入<mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/>的箱子里，
吃了它后的帕鲁会充满活力并产下帕鲁蛋，
并且一次可以产下2个蛋。
description.en:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
Lay eggs twice at once.

description.zh:
如果将它放入<mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/>的箱子里，
吃了它后的帕鲁会充满活力并产下帕鲁蛋。
由此诞生的帕鲁更容易发生突然变异，潜力值也更容易上升。
description.en:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

description.zh:
如果将它放入<mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/>的箱子里，
吃了它后的帕鲁会充满活力并产下帕鲁蛋。
由此诞生的帕鲁更容易继承亲代的被动技能。
description.en:
Place it in the chest at a <mapObjectName id=|BreedFarm|/> to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.
More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
轻盈坚硬的优质素材。
可用于制作防具等。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>」制作。
description.en:
A lightweight yet sturdy material. 
Used to create armor and other equipment.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Egg|/>和<itemName id=|Milk|/>一起拌入意大利面的料理。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>+20%
description.en:
A dish mixing pasta with <itemName id=|Egg|/> and <itemName id=|Milk|/>.
Eating it makes it improves <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +20% for a period of time.

description.zh:
营养丰富的鲜艳根菜蔬菜。
不适合生食。
description.en:
A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable. 
Not suitable for raw consumption.

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Carrot|/>的种子。
是建造农园的必要物品。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Carrot|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
洞窟内的群生蘑菇。
是一种制造具有治疗效果药物的原料。
description.en:
Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves.
Can be made into healing medicine.

description.zh:
可成为建筑物素材的<itemName id=|Cement|/>。
可在<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>制作。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Cement|/> used for creating structures and more.
Can be produced in a <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>.

description.zh:
燃烧<itemName id=|Wood|/>制成的<itemName id=|Charcoal|/>。
与<itemName id=|Sulfur|/>组合可制成<itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/>。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Charcoal|/> made from burning <itemName id=|Wood|/>.
It can be combined with <itemName id=|Sulfur|/> to create <itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/>.

description.zh:
采用高端技术研制的充能型光束步枪。
蓄能后可发射威力巨大的一击。
description.en:
A beam rifle crafted with advanced technology.
Charges energy to deliver one powerful shot.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|ChargeLaserRifle|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_04|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|ChargeLaserRifle|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_04|/>.

description.zh:
采用高端技术研制的充能型光束步枪。
蓄能后可发射威力巨大的一击。

description.zh:
在<itemName id=|Hamburger|/>中夹上了奶酪的菜肴。
吃下去后一段时间，会让你的饱腹感增强，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>增加10%。
description.en: A meal made with a <itemName id=|Hamburger|/> with cheese squeezed between it. Upon consumption, it increases the satiety level for a certain period as well as <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> +10%.

description.zh:
这道料理中的芝士让它达到了至高无上的境界。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/>+20%，
且不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +20%
and stay full longer for a period of time.

description.zh:
用黄油煎炒而制的厚实鸡肉料理。
透出一股清爽的柠檬风味。
食用后的一段时间内，略微提高工作速度。
description.en:
Plump poultry sautéed in butter.
Accented with fresh lemons.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

description.zh:
饱含独特风味的奶香汤品。
食用后的一段时间内，提高工作速度，
且比较不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
Dumud lavishly covered in a thick, creamy soup.
Eating it will increase work speed
and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

description.zh:
埋藏在地下的金属。
可用<itemName id=|MetalDetector|/>在部分岛屿上探测并挖掘出来。
description.en:
A type of metal buried underground. 
It can be detected with a <itemName id=|MetalDetector|/> on certain islands.

description.zh:
编织<itemName id=|Wool|/>制成的<itemName id=|Cloth|/>。
是制作防具时会用到的素材。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Cloth|/> woven from <itemName id=|Wool|/>. 
Required to create armor.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

description.zh:
编织大量<itemName id=|Wool|/>制成的<itemName id=|Cloth2|/>。
是制作优质防具时必不可少的。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>」制作。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Cloth2|/> woven from a large amount of <itemName id=|Wool|/>. 
Required to create high quality armor.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_01|/>.

description.zh:
以<itemName id=|Cloth|/>制成的衣服。
可以抵御夜间的寒意。
description.en:
Clothes made from <itemName id=|Cloth|/>.
Protects against cold nights.

description.zh:
在寒冷地区生产的<itemName id=|ClothArmor|/>。
能够抵御使身体冻僵的寒意。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|ClothArmor|/> produced in cold regions.
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

是现代科技的基石。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>」制作。

A component used in the control of automated equipment and precision machinery.
It's a key component forming the foundation of modern technology.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

有一定防御力，也有一定重量。
description.en:

description.zh:
用于制作金属武器或防具的素材。
将<itemName id=|CopperOre|/>放入熔炉内冶炼制成。
description.en:
A material required to create metal weapons and armor.
Refined from <itemName id=|CopperOre|/> using a furnace.

description.zh:
可用熔炉冶炼成金属锭。
可在洞窟等处发现。
description.en:
Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace.
Can be found in caves and other places.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Corn Soup

description.zh:
具有强效分解作用的危险化学溶剂，
用于精密加工及特殊处理。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>」制作。
description.en:
A dangerous chemical solvent with strong decomposing properties.
Used for precision processing and special treatments.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

description.zh:
能够加工成各种制品的素材。
可通过在油田设置<mapObjectName id=|OilPump|/>来获得。
description.en:
A material that can be processed into various products.
Obtained by installing a <mapObjectName id=|OilPump|/> in an oil field.

description.zh:
用香料炖煮蔬菜和肉而成的料理。
满满大肉块，口感奢华美味。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +25%。
description.en:
A dish made by simmering vegetables and meat with spices. 
The rich flavor is highlighted by large chunks of tender meat. Eating it will increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by 25% for a period of time.

能在命中处留下<characterName id=|PinkCat|/>图案的奇妙枪支。
享受在墙壁及地板上作画的乐趣吧。
description.en:
Strange gun that paints a picture of <characterName id=|PinkCat|/> where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

description.zh:
厚实的汉堡排搭配软嫩的半熟荷包蛋，
两者的完美结合将在口中创造出满满幸福。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/>+20%
description.en:
Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg.
This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +20% for a period of time.

description.zh:
饱含爱意的炖煮鹿肉，肉质酥软、入口即化。
蔬菜与肉的鲜味互相交融，带出浓厚的口感。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>+20%
description.en:
A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love.
The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +20% for a period of time.

description.zh:
闪耀着璀璨光芒的稀有宝石。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
谜一样的钱币。貌似有人在收集。
虽然<characterName id=|MimicDog|/>会持有，
但是不知道为什么解体并不会掉落。
description.en:
A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these.
A <characterName id=|MimicDog|/> will usually have them, but
for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

description.zh:
近距离战斗能力强劲的霰弹枪，可以连射2发。
弹容量虽少，但火力很强。
description.en:
Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading.
Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.

description.zh:
用于发射能自主攻击的无人机的发射器。
最多可以发射9架，持续压制敌方。
description.en:
A launcher that fires drones which perform autonomous attacks.
Capable of deploying up to 9 units, enabling sustained suppression.

description.zh:
这道料理以慢火炖煮而成，
带出了浓郁鲜味及野性十足的风味。
食用后的一段时间内，稍微减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors.
Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

description.zh:
闪耀着绿光的宝石。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
A gemstone that glows green.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
制作菜肴的材料，烤熟后也很美味。
是<characterName id=|ChickenPal|/>生产的。
description.en:
Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals.
<characterName id=|ChickenPal|/> produce them.

description.zh:
敲下去就会触电的近战武器。
帕鲁在触电状态下比较容易捕获。
description.en:
Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact.
Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.

description.zh: 着弹点会放出雷电的步枪，可连锁攻击多个敌人。
description.en: A rifle that releases an electrical discharge from the point of impact, which chains to multiple enemies.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|ElectricArcAssaultRifle|/>使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|AncientWorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|ElectricArcAssaultRifle|/>.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|AncientWorkBench|/>.

description.zh: 着弹点会放出雷电的步枪，可连锁攻击多个敌人。
description.en: A rifle that releases an electrical discharge from the point of impact, which chains to multiple enemies.

description.zh:
可从<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Electricity|/>帕鲁身上获得的素材。 
里面储存了电，必须小心对待。
description.en:
Material obtainable from <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Electricity|/> Pals.
It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

description.en: en Text

description.zh:
可以永久让「攻击力」略微上升的极为珍贵的药水。
帕鲁喝了不会有任何效果。
description.en:
Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Attack by a slight amount when consumed.
Ineffective when used by Pals.

description.zh:

【泰拉瑞亚联动】
使用后可以永久让「生命值」略微上升。
若相应能力值已达上限，或在帕鲁身上使用，则不会发生任何变化。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
Grants a permanent HP boost upon use. 
No effect if HP is maxed or used on a Pal.

description.zh:

帕鲁喝了不会有任何效果。

Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Stamina by a slight amount when consumed.
Ineffective when used by Pals.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的简单钓饵。
垂钓必备。
description.en:
Basic fishing bait used to lure in Pals. 
Required for fishing.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
在<itemName id=|FishingBait_1|/>的基础上进一步改良，
能降低小游戏捕获计量槽的减少量。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved from <itemName id=|FishingBait_1|/> to reduce the rate at which the capture gauge drains in the fishing minigame.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
在<itemName id=|FishingBait_1|/>的基础上进一步改良，
更容易诱导帕鲁咬钩。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved from <itemName id=|FishingBait_1|/> to increase the chances of Pals biting the bait.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
经过改良，更容易诱导帕鲁咬钩。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved from <itemName id=|FishingBait_1|/> to increase the chances of Pals biting the bait.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
在<itemName id=|FishingBait_2|/>的基础上进一步改良，
垂钓时能获得更多道具。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved from <itemName id=|FishingBait_2|/> to increase the number of items obtained from fishing.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。

description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
经过改良，能使小游戏的判定条稍微变大。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved to slightly enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
经过改良，能使小游戏的判定条变大，
垂钓时能获得更多道具。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
Improved to enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame and increase the number of items obtained from fishing.

description.zh:
用来吸引帕鲁上钩的钓饵。
由<itemName id=|FishingBait_3|/>改造而成，专为挑战者准备的钓饵。
相比<itemName id=|FishingBait_3|/>，小游戏的判定条更小，
但可以大幅增加垂钓时获得的道具。
description.en:
Bait that lures in Pals. 
A modified version of <itemName id=|FishingBait_3|/> designed for skilled anglers. 
The minigame bar is reduced in size, but the number of items obtained is greatly increased.

description.zh:
用来钓帕鲁的钓竿。
在携带钓饵的状态下前往有鱼影的水边使用钓竿即可开始垂钓。
适合新手使用，能够钓到低等级的帕鲁。
description.en:
A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. 
Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. 
Perfect for beginners and ideal for reeling in low level Pals.

description.zh:
用来钓帕鲁的钓竿。
比<itemName id=|FishingRod_01_1|/>更坚固一些，性能略有提升。
适合新手使用，能够钓到低等级的帕鲁。
description.en:
A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. 
It's sturdier and offers slightly better performance than <itemName id=|FishingRod_01_1|/>. 
Perfect for beginners and ideal for reeling in low level Pals.

description.zh:
用来钓帕鲁的钓竿。
在携带钓饵的状态下前往有鱼影的水边使用钓竿即可开始垂钓。
性能进一步提升，垂钓成功率稍微上升。
description.en:
A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. 
Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. 
It boasts improved performance, making catches a bit easier.

description.zh:

description.en:

可以使攻击目标陷入点燃状态。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Flamethrower|/> that fires long-range flame.
Can set the enemy on fire.

火焰喷射器的燃料，
也是<itemName id=|Flamethrower|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_03|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|Flamethrower|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_03|/>.

description.zh:
生火时必不可少的素材。
偶尔可在挖石头时发现。
description.en:
A material required to start a fire.
Can sometimes be found when excavating rocks.

description.zh:
由<itemName id=|Wheat|/>研磨而成的<itemName id=|Flour|/>。
可用于制作<itemName id=|Pan|/>。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Flour|/> made from grinding <itemName id=|Wheat|/>.
It can be used as an ingredient in making <itemName id=|Pan|/>.

description.zh:
可在中距离战斗时发挥作用的<itemName id=|FragGrenade|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，给敌人造成伤害。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Dark|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，给敌人造成<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dark|/>伤害。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade_Dark|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dark|/> damage to enemies.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Dragon|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，给敌人造成<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dragon|/>伤害。
description.en:

It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dragon|/> damage to enemies.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Elec|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，对附近放出电击。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade_Elec|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Fire|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，在周围燃起烈火。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade_Fire|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Ground|/>。

description.en:

description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade_Ice|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Leaf|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，给敌人造成<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Leaf|/>伤害。
description.en:

description.zh:
改良后的破片手榴弹。
投掷数秒后引爆，给大范围的敌人造成伤害。
description.en:
An improved frag grenade.
It explodes a few seconds after being thrown, dealing massive damage to enemies.

description.zh:
利于中等距离战斗的<itemName id=|FragGrenade_Water|/>。
投掷数秒后引爆，给敌人造成<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Water|/>伤害。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade_Water|/> useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Water|/> damage to enemies.

description.zh:
极为美味多汁的鸡肉料理。
食用后的一段时间内，略微提高工作速度，
且减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
Magnificently juicy poultry.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|Egg|/>煎熟后变得更加美味。
很奇妙地，吃起来更有饱足感。
description.en:
An <itemName id=|Egg|/> now fried and even more delicious.
Great for keeping hunger away.

description.zh:
紧致口感的鱼肉与酥脆的外皮搭配得恰到好处。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>+10%，
且减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10%
and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

description.zh: 炒了<itemName id=|Lettuce|/>和<itemName id=|Meat|/>的菜肴。吃了之后一段时间，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%。
description.en: A dish prepared by stir frying <itemName id=|Lettuce|/> and <itemName id=|Meat|/>. When eaten, it will temporarily increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10%.

description.zh:
一种非常难以获得的珍贵果实。
可稍微提升帕鲁的「防御力」的潜力值。
description.en:
Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Slightly increases a Pal's Defense.

description.zh:
一种非常难以获得的珍贵果实。
可稍微提升帕鲁的「攻击力」的潜力值。
description.en:
Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Slightly increases a Pal's Attack.

一种非常难以获得的珍贵果实。

description.zh:

description.en:

Its warmth and defense have been improved.

description.en:

Useful for surviving in cold climates.

附带特殊过滤装置的面具。
能让腐雾伤害无效化。

A mask with a special filtration system. 
Negates damage taken from corrosive mist.

<itemName id=|GatlingGun|/>等使用的弹药。

可通过高速扫射实现压制战场的加特林机枪。
压制射击能够将敌人射成蜂窝。
description.en:
A Gatling Gun capable of rapid fire. 
Mows down enemies with suppressive fire.

description.zh:
将腌制过的羊肉用炭火精心烤制而成的料理。
食用后的一段时间内，略微提高工作速度，
且稍微减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

description.zh:
展开后即可在空中滑翔的滑翔伞。
此为量产款式，有一定的飞行速度。
description.en:
A glider for soaring through the air.
A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast.

description.zh:
展开后可在空中滑翔的滑翔伞。
性能得到进一步提升，速度和升力都提高了。
description.en:
A glider for soaring through the air.
Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.

description.zh:
展开后即可在空中滑翔的滑翔伞。
构造简单，无法高速飞行。
description.en:
A glider for soaring through the air.
Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.

description.zh:
展开后即可在空中滑翔的滑翔伞。
此款式性能有所提升，能以相当快的速度飞行。
description.en:
A glider for soaring through the air.
With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speeds.

description.zh:
展开后可在空中滑翔的滑翔伞。
性能得到进一步提升，速度和升力都提高了。
description.en:
A glider for soaring through the air.
Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Grape

description.zh:
用于快速移动的爪钩枪。
能将爪钩射向目标地点，再将使用者牵引过去。
可在有高低差的地方轻松移动。
description.en:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
It allows for easy movement between places with varying elevation.

description.zh:
用于快速移动的爪钩枪。
能将爪钩射向目标地点，再将使用者牵引过去。
经过改良，射程变得更远。
description.en:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
Since it's upgraded, it now has greater range.

description.zh:
用于快速移动的爪钩枪。
能将爪钩射向目标地点，再将使用者牵引过去。
在试验品数据的基础上进行改良，进一步提升了性能。
description.en:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
Using data from prototype versions, its capabilities have been further increased.

description.zh:
用于快速移动的爪钩枪。
能将爪钩射向目标地点，再将使用者牵引过去。
经过研究改良，灵活性可谓无与伦比。
description.en:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target.
As a result of research, it has achieved overwhelming mobility.

description.zh:
用于快速移动的爪钩枪。
能将爪钩射向目标地点，再将使用者牵引过去。
采用了新型材料，大幅缩短了散热时间。
description.en:
It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. 
With new materials, cooldown time has been significantly reduced.

description.zh:
将酱料裹在<itemName id=|Potato|/>上烤制的料理。
热腾腾地享用，最为美味。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> +10%，
且不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection. 
Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by 10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|GrenadeLauncher|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_03|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|GrenadeLauncher|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_03|/>.

description.zh:
能够发射造成大范围爆炸的榴弹。
对付大群敌人时很有用。
description.en:
Fires grenades that cause wide-ranging explosions.
Useful when dealing with a large number of enemies.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Grilled Fish

description.zh:
烤好的肉。
肚子饱饱，心情好好。
description.en:
Grilled meat.
A full stomach leads to smiling faces.

description.zh:
使用大量新鲜野莓增添香气，
借此带出羊肉的独特风味。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>+10%
description.en:
Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries
creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
豪迈地在新鲜的鞘刀鱼排上撒盐烤熟制成的菜品。
食用后的一段时间内，不会受到击退和后仰影响。
description.en:
Fresh fillets of <characterName id=|SwordCutlassFish|/> salted and grilled into a simple dish.
When eaten, it nullifies knockback and flinching for a certain period of time.

description.zh:
能够发射自动追踪敌人的导弹。
导弹在命中后将爆炸，造成大范围伤害。
description.en:
Fires missiles that automatically track and pursue enemies.
Missiles explode upon impact, causing damage over a wide area.

description.zh:

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Gunpowder

description.zh:
用于发射子弹的<itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/>。
是制作子弹时必不可少的。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/> used to fire ammunition.
Required to make bullets.

description.zh:
蘑菇和肉馅包裹在面皮里煮成的料理。
有嚼劲的口感令人难以抗拒。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%，
且比较不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
A dish made by wrapping a filling of mushrooms and meat in wheat flour and boiling it. The chewy texture is irresistible. 
Eating it improves your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by 10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
在<itemName id=|Pan|/>中夹有汉堡、<itemName id=|Lettuce|/>、<itemName id=|Tomato|/>的菜肴。
吃了之后一段时间，饱腹感更强，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%。
description.en: A dish where a hamburger, <itemName id=|Lettuce|/> the <itemName id=|Tomato|/> are contained in the <itemName id=|Pan|/>. When eaten, it boosts one's stomach fullness and <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a while.

description.zh:
将牛肉鲜味与面包甜味融为一体的极品。
食用后的一段时间内，提高工作速度，
且稍微减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece.
Eating it will increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

description.zh:
子弹容纳量及连射性能经过强化的手枪。
每秒火力比<itemName id=|MakeshiftHandgun|/>更强。
description.en:
A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities.
Has more immediate firepower than a <itemName id=|MakeshiftHandgun|/>.

十分牢固可保护头部的头盔。 
据说曾有很多人从<characterName id=|Deer|/>掉下来撞到头 
所以该头盔被制造了出来。
description.en:
A tough helmet that protects its wearer's head.
It was apparently made after a number of people injured their heads
after taking a tumble off a <characterName id=|Deer|/>.

but those made from <characterName id=|MopBaby|/> materials are of poor quality, and more commonly found.

<itemName id=|Herbs|/> good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull.
They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

description.zh:
精心切割<itemName id=|Wood_Fine|/>得到的板材。
拥有美丽的木纹，在建筑中常用于营造高端奢华的感觉。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>」制作。
description.en:
Fine planks carefully carved from <itemName id=|Wood_Fine|/>.
They have beautiful wood grain and are used for structures with a luxurious feel.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

description.zh:
使用后可以移动至最近的据点。
无法在地下城里使用。
description.en:
Transports you to the nearest base.
Cannot be used in dungeons and other similar locations.

description.zh:
用于发射帕鲁球的发射器。
用它射出的帕鲁球会追踪帕鲁。
description.en:
A launcher for firing spheres.
Fired spheres home in on Pals.

description.zh:
可从<characterName id=|SoldierBee|/>身上取得的蜂蜜。
甘甜美味。
description.en:
Honey harvested from <characterName id=|SoldierBee|/>.
It's sweet and tasty.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Hop

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的<itemName id=|Horn|/>。
可用于制作药品等。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Horn|/> collected from Pals.
Used to create medicines and more.

description.zh:
把香肠夹在<itemName id=|Pan|/>中的菜肴。
食用后会使饱腹感持续一段时间。
description.en: A culinary dinner sandwiching a sausage in an <itemName id=|Pan|/>. Consumption leads to an improved sense of fullness for a specific period.

description.zh:
在面包中夹入厚实的香肠制成的料理。
烤得酥脆的外壳与辛香风味绝妙无比。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>+20%
description.en:
Thick sausage wedged between warm buns.
The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for.
Eating it will increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +20% for a period of time.

description.zh:
加热后变得更加美味。
很奇妙地，喝起来更有饱足感。
description.en:
Even more delicious when warmed up.
Great for keeping hunger away.

description.zh:
可从<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Ice|/>帕鲁身上获得的素材。
是<mapObjectName id=|Trap_MineFreeze|/>等的素材。
description.en:
Material obtainable from <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Ice|/> Pals.
Can be used to make <mapObjectName id=|Trap_MineFreeze|/> and more.

description.zh:
印花枪使用的弹药。
可用墨水画出帕鲁的图案。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for Decal Guns. 
Uses ink to paint a picture of a Pal.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/>.

description.zh:
以优质金属制成的盔甲。
防御力极优，但也相当沉重。
description.en:
Armor made from high quality metal.
Quite heavy, but provides excellent defense.

description.zh:
经过改良的<itemName id=|IronArmor|/>。
能够抵御使身体冻僵的寒意。
description.en:
Improved <itemName id=|IronArmor|/>.
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

用于制作优质金属武器及防具的素材。
将<itemName id=|CopperOre|/>与<itemName id=|Coal|/>放入炉中即可制作。
description.en:
A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor.
Refined from <itemName id=|CopperOre|/> and <itemName id=|Coal|/> using a furnace.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
在<itemName id=|Pan|/>上涂上果酱的料理。
野莓的甜味和面包很搭。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Pan|/> with jam spread on it.
The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

description.zh:
用<itemName id=|Meat_JellyfishFairy|/>和<itemName id=|PalFluid|/>制作的奇妙甜点。
食用后的一段时间内，获得的经验值会少量提升，
<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%。
description.en:
An unusual treat crafted from <itemName id=|Meat_JellyfishFairy|/> and <itemName id=|PalFluid|/>. 
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
用<itemName id=|Meat_JellyfishGhost|/>和<itemName id=|Berries|/>制作的奇妙甜点。
食用后的一段时间内，获得的经验值会少量提升，
<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> +10%。
description.en:
An unusual treat crafted from <itemName id=|Meat_JellyfishGhost|/> and <itemName id=|Berries|/>. 
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
近战用的<itemName id=|Katana|/>。
刀锋凌厉，斩断一切。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Katana|/> for close-range combat.
Slices through with razor-sharp precision, cutting cleanly in one strike.

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「嫉妒他人之繁荣，带来破灭之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of envying humanity's prosperity and bringing about its downfall.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「与傲慢寻求共生，招来灾厄之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of arrogantly seeking coexistence, and bringing forth the Calamity.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「不愿接受自身宿命，强求缘分之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of rejecting one's fate, seeking the bonds of another.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「舍弃人性，堕入毁灭之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of abandoning one's humanity, descending the path to ruin.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「吞食星球命脉，仍不知满足之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of devouring the lifeblood of the stars, yet never knowing satiety.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「寻求天外禁忌，践踏人理之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of seeking forbidden truth beyond the veil, transcending the bounds of human reason.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「任凭怒火燎烧，散播死亡之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of surrendering oneself to wrath, spreading death without end.|

description.zh:
曾在这片土地上繁荣发展的古代文明的遗物。
尽管目前还未能探知它的全貌，但近年的研究
结果显示，它可能是某种巨大装置的一部分。

　「否定万物万象之生，却仍诞生之罪。」
description.en:
A relic of an ancient civilization that once flourished in this land.
Although its true nature remains unknown, recent research suggests that it may have been part of a massive device.

|The sin of being born while denying all life in creation.|

description.zh:
挂在腰上的提灯。 
到了夜晚会自动点亮。 
也可以切换照明模式使它常亮。
带1个在身上就够用了。
description.en:
A lantern that can be attached to the hip.
It lights up automatically at night.
You can also switch its lighting mode to keep it on at all times.
Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

description.zh:
挂在腰间的大范围照明提灯。
到了夜晚会自动点亮。 
也可以切换照明模式使它常亮。
带1个在身上就够用了。
description.en:
A lantern that can be attached to the hip.
It lights up automatically at night.
You can also switch its lighting mode to keep it on at all times.
Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

猛烈的火力能瞬间压制复数敌人。

Its overwhelming firepower can take down multiple enemies at once.

description.zh:
能够汇聚并发射等离子能量的便携式等离子切割器。
从挖矿到伐木皆可胜任，用途广泛。
利用它发出的高能射线，甚至可以挖掘特殊的矿石。
description.en:
A portable plasma cutter that concentrates and emits plasma energy.
It supports a wide range of uses, from ore excavation to tree cutting.
Its high-output energy also allows for the mining of special ores.

description.zh:
加工陨石制作而成的发射器。
命中时会像陨石一样引发爆炸。
description.en:
A phenomenal weapon that fires a meteor.
Upon striking its target, it creates an explosion similar to a meteorite impact.

description.zh:

description.zh:
在极限环境下经年累月形成的熔岩块。
其中封存的蓝色熔岩至今仍然在散发热度。
description.en:
A mass of lava formed over long years in extreme environments.
The sealed-in blue lava is still emitting heat.

description.zh:
源自帕鲁的<itemName id=|Leather|/>，可用来制作防具。
可从部分帕鲁身上取得。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Leather|/> taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material.
It can be obtained from certain Pals.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
绿色叶子，是沙拉中的王者。
爽脆口感与清新口味都是最棒的。
description.en:
A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must.
It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Lettuce|/>的种子。
是建造农园的必要物品。
可从商人处购买。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Lettuce|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

description.zh:
可治疗<uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_Weakness|/>及<uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_DepressionSprain|/>的<itemName id=|LuxuryMedicines|/>。
无法恢复HP。
description.en:
<itemName id=|LuxuryMedicines|/> that are effective at treating <uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_Weakness|/> and <uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_DepressionSprain|/>.
Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: LuxuryOmelette

description.zh:
将这块神秘的结晶交给帕鲁，
便可使该帕鲁的等级提升1级。
description.en:
Strange crystal that when given to a Pal
raises its level by one.

description.zh:
建造大量设施时必不可少的部件。
可在<mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>制作。
description.en:
Necessary for building various facilities.
Can be made with a <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

description.zh:
制作精密机器时必不可少的<itemName id=|MachineParts2|/>。
可在<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>制作。
description.en:
Required to create precision equipment.
Can be made with a <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

description.zh: 用于<itemName id=|Machingun|/>等武器的子弹。
description.en: Ammo for <itemName id=|Machingun|/> and other similar weapons.

description.zh: 用于<itemName id=|Magnum|/>等武器的子弹。
description.en: Ammo for <itemName id=|Magnum|/> and other similar weapons.

description.zh:
用废料手工制作的突击步枪。
连射能力优秀且射程远，但单发威力较低。
description.en:
An assault rifle handmade from scraps. 
It excels in rate of fire and long range, but its single-shot power is low.

description.zh:
手工制造的破旧手枪。
较适合用于近距离战斗，但每次只能射出一发子弹。
description.en:
A handgun created from spare parts.
Relatively well suited for close-quarters combat, but fires only one shot at a time.

用废料手工制作的霰弹枪。
射程短，但近距离战斗能力强。
description.en:
A shotgun handmade from scraps. 
It has a short range but excels in close-range combat

description.zh:
用废料手工制作的霰弹枪。
射程短，但近距离战斗能力强。

description.zh:
沉睡在海底的<itemName id=|ManganeseOre|/>的合金。
具备很高的能量耐受性，用于制作武器等物品。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace4|/>」冶炼。
description.en:
An alloy made from <itemName id=|ManganeseOre|/> found on the ocean floor. 
Highly resistant to energy, making it ideal for crafting weapons.
Can be refined at <mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace4|/>.

description.zh:
在深海中历经漫长岁月形成的稀有矿石。
可利用磁铁和钓竿从深海中打捞上来。
description.en:
A rare ore formed over countless years 
in the deep sea. 
Can be retrieved from the depths with 
a magnet and fishing rod.

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Mushroom|/>淋上腌泡汁后烹饪而成的料理。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/>+10%
description.en:
A dish made by marinating <itemName id=|Mushroom|/>s in a marinade.
Eating it improves <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by +10% for a period of time.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
粉碎的看不出原型的，某种生物组织。
解体通过基因复原的帕鲁时产生的残留物，
由于没有任何用途，只能卖掉或丢掉。
description.en:
Pulverized remnants of some kind of biological tissue.
Leftover residue from butchering a genetically reconstructed Pal,
it serves no purpose and can only be sold or discarded.

description.zh:
帕鲁的肉。
十分新鲜，几乎可供人类生食。
description.en:
Pal meat.
It’s so fresh that even a human could safely eat it raw.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
将肉和土豆用甜辣口味炖煮的料理。
不知为何有种怀念的味道。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> +25%。
description.en:
A dish made by simmering meat and potatoes in a sweet and savory sauce. 
It has a mysteriously nostalgic taste. Eating it will increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by 25% for a period of time.

description.zh:
可用于肢解召唤出的帕鲁的菜刀。
装备此道具时「抚摸」选项会转变为「肢解」。
帕鲁一经解体后将无法再度复生。
description.en:
Knife for butchering Pals.
When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher.
Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

description.zh:
将肉酱拌入意面的菜肴。
一旦食用，SAN值在一段时间内减少的慢，
<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%。
description.en: A pasta dish combined with meat sauce. Eating it makes it difficult for sanity to decrease and provides <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10% for a while.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|BerryGoat|/>的肉。
营养价值高，且相当健康。
肉中的野莓香味会让人胃口倍增。
description.en:
<characterName id=|BerryGoat|/> meat.
Healthy and full of nutrients.
Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|Boar|/>的肉。
其特点是浓郁的野性风味。
汁水十足，营养价值极高。
description.en:
<characterName id=|Boar|/> meat.
Full of the delicious flavors of wild game.
Juicy and nutritious.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|ChickenPal|/>的肉。
爽口且易食用，
很受帕洛斯群岛居民的喜爱。
description.en:
<characterName id=|ChickenPal|/> meat.
Light and easy to eat,
it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|CowPal|/>的肉。
口感厚实且多汁，更有美丽霜降油花。
是帕洛斯群岛居民最爱的肉类。
description.en:
<characterName id=|CowPal|/> meat.
Thick, juicy and marbled.
Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|Deer|/>的肉。
虽然清淡低脂，但是风味十足。
description.en:
<characterName id=|Deer|/> meat.
Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|Eagle|/>的肉。
富含营养且充满强烈的风味。
description.en:
<characterName id=|Eagle|/> meat.
Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|GrassMammoth|/>的肉。
存在感十足，且滋味颇具冲击力。
份量大得惊人，连大胃王都能喂饱。
description.en:
<characterName id=|GrassMammoth|/> meat.
With massive size comes massive flavor.
Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|IceCrocodile|/>的鳄鱼肉。
富有嚼劲，越嚼越觉得唇齿留香。
description.en:
<characterName id=|IceCrocodile|/> meat. 
Has a satisfying chew that brings out layers of umami as you eat.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|IceDeer|/>的肉。
可常保低温的奇妙鹿肉。
非常不容易腐败。
description.en:
<characterName id=|IceDeer|/> meat.
Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures.
Takes a very long time to spoil.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|JellyfishFairy|/>的水母伞。
独特的弹牙口感让人欲罢不能，尽显大海的馈赠。
description.en:
<characterName id=|JellyfishFairy|/>'s fleshy bell. 
Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully chewy bite.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|JellyfishGhost|/>的水母伞。
独特的脆弹口感让人欲罢不能，尽显大海的馈赠。
description.en:
<characterName id=|JellyfishGhost|/>'s fleshy bell. 
Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully plump texture.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|Kelpie|/>的肉。
其特点是爽弹的口感和甜味。
因为是鱼肉，保鲜时间很短。
description.en:
<characterName id=|Kelpie|/> meat.
Tender and slightly sweet.
Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|LazyCatfish|/>的肉。
肥而多汁，浓郁且风味十足。
饱满的独特口感也充满魅力。
description.en:
<characterName id=|LazyCatfish|/> meat.
Fatty with a rich taste.
Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|OctopusGirl|/>的章鱼足。
口感脆弹，味道清淡可口。
description.en:
<characterName id=|OctopusGirl|/> tentacle. 
Known for its springy texture and light, refined flavor.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|SakuraSaurus|/>的肉。
蕴藏强大能量的巨大肉块。
富含源自光合作用的大量营养物质。
description.en:
<characterName id=|SakuraSaurus|/> meat.
Giant meat full of massive stores of energy.
Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|SheepBall|/>的肉。
有着独特风味的红肉。
稍有骚味，但相当鲜美。
description.en:
<characterName id=|SheepBall|/> meat.
Red meat with a unique flavor.
Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

description.zh:
切割好的<characterName id=|SwordCutlassFish|/>肉排。
柔韧而饱满的肉质是它的特征。
背骨像刀剑一样锋利，烹饪时要当心。
description.en:
Raw slices of <characterName id=|SwordCutlassFish|/>. 
Characterized by its supple, plump flesh.
Caution is required when preparing it due to its sword-like spine.

description.zh:
可治疗<uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_GastricUlcer|/>及<uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_Fracture|/>的不可思议的<itemName id=|Medicines|/>。
无法恢复HP。
description.en:
Strange <itemName id=|Medicines|/> that are effective at treating <uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_GastricUlcer|/> and <uiCommon id=|COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_Fracture|/>.
Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

description.zh:
使用后可探测隐藏在地下城中的铬铁矿，并标记其位置。
一旦远离，标记就会消失。
description.en:
Using this reveals hidden Chromite deposits in dungeons, marking them for easier mining. 
Deposits will become unmarked if you move too far away.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|Launcher_Meteor|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_02|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|Launcher_Meteor|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_02|/>.

description.zh:
从天而降的石头碎片。
内部含有丰富的<itemName id=|Pal_Crystal_S|/>，
在「<mapObjectName id=|Crusher|/>」处进行加工可以取出。
description.en:
Fragment of a rock from outer space.
Contains large amounts of <itemName id=|Pal_Crystal_S|/>,
which can be extracted by placing it in a <mapObjectName id=|Crusher|/>.

description.zh:
可直接饮用，也可作为菜肴的材料。
可从<characterName id=|CowPal|/>获取。
description.en:
Drink it as is, or use it in various meals.
Can be milked from <characterName id=|CowPal|/>.

description.zh:
对于控制危险分子有极高功效的<itemName id=|MindControlDrug|/>。
无法恢复HP。
description.en:
<itemName id=|MindControlDrug|/> that are extremely effective in controlling dissidents.
Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

description.zh:
加入大量蔬菜熬制的汤品。
喝下去全身会由内而外暖和起来。
食用后的一段时间内，提高工作速度。
description.en:
A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables. 
Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|GuidedMissileLauncher|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_03|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|GuidedMissileLauncher|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_03|/>.

description.zh:
可在帕洛斯群岛交易的货币。
交给商人可兑换物品或帕鲁。
description.en:
Currency traded on Palpagos Island.
Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

names.zh: 多联装追踪导弹发射器

description.zh:
实现多联装的导弹发射器。
能够连续发射自动追踪敌人的导弹。
description.en:
A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once.
Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

names.zh: 多联装追踪导弹发射器

description.zh:
实现多联装的导弹发射器。
能够连续发射自动追踪敌人的导弹。
description.en:
A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once.
Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

description.en:
A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once.
Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

description.en:
A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once.
Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

names.zh: 多联装追踪导弹发射器

实现多联装的导弹发射器。
能够连续发射自动追踪敌人的导弹。
description.en:
A missile launcher that can hold multiple ammo at once.
Fires a series of missiles that automatically track and follow enemies.

description.zh:
可生吃的蘑菇。
走在岛上随处可见。
description.en:
A mushroom that can be eaten raw.
They can be found anywhere on the island.

description.zh:
喝下后会变得精神异常亢奋的蘑菇饮料。
饮用后的一段时间内会大幅提高工作速度，
但SAN值也会大幅下降。
description.en:
Mushroom juice known for its incredibly uplifting effect.
Drinking it greatly boosts work speed for a period of time, 
but drastically decreases SAN value.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|Mushroom|/>的奶油汤。
食用后的一段时间内，比较不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
Cream soup made of <itemName id=|Mushroom|/>s.
Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|Mushroom|/> 的炖菜。
食用后能在一段时间内提高工作速度，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%。
description.en: A stew made with <itemName id=|Mushroom|/>. Consumption elevates work speed and offers <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10% for a particular duration.

description.zh:
古旧又简朴的枪。
每一发均威力惊人，但装填子弹较花时间。
description.en:
Simple, old fashioned gun. 
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

description.zh:
古旧又简朴的枪。
每一发均威力惊人，但装填子弹较花时间。
description.en:
Simple, old fashioned gun. 
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

description.zh:
古旧又简朴的枪。
每一发均威力惊人，但装填子弹较花时间。
description.en:
Simple, old fashioned gun. 
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

description.zh:
古旧又简朴的枪。
每一发均威力惊人，但装填子弹较花时间。
description.en:
Simple, old fashioned gun. 
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

description.zh:
古旧又简朴的枪。
每一发均威力惊人，但装填子弹较花时间。
description.en:
Simple, old fashioned gun. 
Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

description.zh:
饮用这种果汁能让心情非常舒爽。
饮用后的一段时间内会提高工作速度，
但SAN值也会下降。
description.en:
Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed.
Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time,
but significantly lowers SAN.

description.zh:
可在夜晚沙漠中发现的沙子。 
用于制作某些饰品的材料。
description.en:
Sand that can be found in the desert at night. 
Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Night Vision Goggles

description.zh:
【ULTRAKILL 联动】
参考遥远之地制造的战争机器人的结构打造的盔甲。
具备在造成伤害时进行自我修复的功能。
description.en:
[ULTRAKILL Collab] 
Armor modeled after the Final War machine built in a distant land.
It features a self-repair system that activates when dealing damage.

description.zh:
【ULTRAKILL 联动】
参考遥远之地制造的战争机器人的结构打造的盔甲。
具备在造成伤害时进行自我修复的功能。
description.en:
[ULTRAKILL Collab] 
Armor modeled after the Final War machine built in a distant land.
It features a self-repair system that activates when dealing damage.

description.zh:
【ULTRAKILL 联动】
参考遥远之地制造的维和机器人的结构打造的盔甲。
舍弃自我修复功能，转而更进一步强化了装甲。
description.en:
[ULTRAKILL Collab]
Armor modeled after the New Peace machine built in a distant land. 
Its self-repair system was removed in favor of sturdier plating.

description.zh:
【ULTRAKILL 联动】
参考遥远之地制造的维和机器人的结构打造的盔甲。
舍弃自我修复功能，转而更进一步强化了装甲。
description.en:
[ULTRAKILL Collab]
Armor modeled after the New Peace machine built in a distant land. 
Its self-repair system was removed in favor of sturdier plating.

description.zh:
【ULTRAKILL 联动】
利用电能驱动可连续射击的左轮手枪。
装备期间，投掷捕获用帕鲁球的动作会变为掷硬币，
<itemName id=|OctaviaRevolver|/>的子弹击中硬币时将会弹向敌人。
description.en:
[ULTRAKILL Collab]
An electrically powered revolver capable of firing endlessly.
When equipped, Pal Sphere throws are replaced with Coin Toss.
Hitting a coin with the <itemName id=|OctaviaRevolver|/> causes the bullet to ricochet toward enemies.

description.zh:
【ULTRAKILL 联动】
利用热能驱动可连续射击的霰弹枪。
装备期间，投掷捕获用帕鲁球的动作将变为发射核心，长按可充能并延长核心发射的射程。
被<itemName id=|OctaviaRevolver|/>击中的核心将会爆炸。
description.en:
[ULTRAKILL Collab] 
A shotgun powered by heat, capable of firing endlessly. 
When equipped, throwing a Pal Sphere is replaced with Core Eject. 
Hold to charge and extend its range. Cores hit by shots from <itemName id=|OctaviaRevolver|/> will explode.

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Meat_OctopusGirl|/>放进<itemName id=|Flour|/>做出的面糊中烤制而成的圆球形小吃。
食用后的一段时间内，获得的经验值会少量提升。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Meat_OctopusGirl|/> encased in a <itemName id=|Flour|/> dough and grilled into round bites. 
Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

description.zh:
大量使用墨沫姬的章鱼腿，与新鲜意面一同烹制的海味大餐。
食用后的一段时间内，可令受到的爆炸伤害无效。
description.en:
Fresh pasta is tossed with fragrant seafood in this exceptional dish, using Gloopie tentacles to elevate it even further.
When eaten, it nullifies damage from explosions for a certain period of time.

description.zh:
略显陈旧的左轮手枪。
单发威力优于<itemName id=|Handgun_default|/>。
description.en:
A slightly outdated revolving handgun. 
Compared to <itemName id=|Handgun_default|/>, it excels in single-shot power.

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Egg|/>烹饪后涂上番茄酱的料理。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/>+10%
description.en:
A dish made by frying an <itemName id=|Egg|/> and topping it with ketchup.
Eating it improves <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by +10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
自古深受喜爱的易种植作物。
不适合生食。
description.en:
A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. 
Not suitable for eating raw.

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Onion|/>的种子。
是建造农园的必要物品。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Onion|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.

description.zh:
饮用这种果汁能让心情舒爽。
饮用后的一段时间内会略微提高工作速度，
但SAN值也会略微下降。
description.en:
Juice that improves mood when consumed.
Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time,
but lowers SAN.

description.zh:
可提升参战帕鲁的攻击力的饰品。
还可大幅提升参战帕鲁的暗属性伤害。
description.en:
An accessory that raises the Attack of the Pal fighting alongside you.
It also significantly increases their Dark damage.

description.zh:
无需重复装弹即可实现连续射击的突击步枪。
但长时间连射容易引发过热，
导致出现巨大破绽，请务必注意。
description.en:
An assault rifle capable of firing endlessly without reloading.
Prolonged bursts cause overheating, leaving you exposed.
Use with caution.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|OverheatRifle|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_04|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|OverheatRifle|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_04|/>.

description.en:
A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal.
By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

description.zh: 浓缩了世界树能量的结晶。 可以让的帕鲁觉醒，解放其隐藏的能力。
description.en: A crystal formed from condensed World Tree energy. It awakens Pals, releasing their hidden power.

description.zh: 浓缩了世界树能量的结晶。 可以让的帕鲁觉醒，解放其隐藏的能力。
description.en: A crystal formed from condensed World Tree energy. It awakens Pals, releasing their hidden power.

description.zh: 世界树的能量积聚在帕鲁体内形成的石头。 加工后可以制成道具， 解放帕鲁体内隐藏的能力。

description.zh:
从古代遗迹裡挖出的废品。
其中蕴藏了许多失传技术的资讯。
此物品极具价值，相当炙手可热。
description.en:
Debris excavated from ancient ruins.
Contains abundant information on lost technology.
Extremely valuable, people from all walks of life are now seeking such crystals.

description.zh:
部分强大的<uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dark|/>帕鲁掉落的素材。
用于制作强力饰品的材料。
description.en:
Dropped by some powerful <uiCommon id=|COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dark|/> Pals. 
Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

description.zh:
向伙伴帕鲁射击，
会在一定时间内强化该帕鲁的攻击力和防御力。
向敌人射击则会造成伤害。
description.en:
Firing this at a Pal in your team temporarily boosts that Pal's attack and defense. 
Firing it at an enemy deals damage instead.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|PalDopingShot|/>等使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|PalDopingShot|/> and similar weapons.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/>.

description.zh:
向伙伴帕鲁射击可强化该帕鲁的攻击力与防御力，
向敌人射击则会造成伤害。经过改良后，
强化效果、持续时间及对敌伤害均有所提升。
description.en:
Firing it at an allied Pal boosts their attack and defense, while hitting an enemy deals damage. 
Thanks to improvements, the boost is stronger and lasts longer, and it deals more damage to enemies.

把它放进<mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/>裡孵化吧。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Normal_05|/>.
A gentle spirit throbs within—as if a monster is about to be born.
Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|PalEgg_Water_01|/>。
可感受到纯洁的胎动。
放进<mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/>孵化它吧。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|PalEgg_Water_01|/>.

Place in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

内里蕴含着世界树的能量。
放进<mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/>孵化它吧。

An <itemName id=|PalEgg_WorldTree_01|/>.

Place it in a <mapObjectName id=|HatchingPalEgg|/> to incubate it.

description.zh:
可从水属性帕鲁身上取得的体液。
黏度很高，相当有用。
description.en:
Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal.
Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

description.zh:
可以改变帕鲁性别的神奇药品。
可在<mapObjectName id=|OperatingTable|/>使用。
description.en:
A mysterious medicine that can change a Pal's gender. 
Can be used at the <mapObjectName id=|OperatingTable|/>.

description.zh:
具有恢复效果的<itemName id=|FragGrenade|/>。
命中后会立即爆裂，
为伙伴帕鲁恢复生命值。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|FragGrenade|/> with healing effects.
It bursts on impact, restoring HP to allied Pals.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|CaptainPenguin|/>掉落的羽饰。
艳丽的颜色是它的特征，是用于制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Plume dropped from a <characterName id=|CaptainPenguin|/>.
Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|CatMage|/>掉下的体毛。
质地柔软，是用于制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Hair dropped from a <characterName id=|CatMage|/>.
Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|ColorfulBird|/>掉下的羽毛。
因其色彩美丽且受欢迎，常常被用作制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Feathers dropped from a <characterName id=|ColorfulBird|/>.
Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|LizardMan|/>掉落的前冠。
坚硬带刺，常常被用作制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Crest dropped from a <characterName id=|LizardMan|/>.
Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|MopBaby|/>掉落的棉毛。
因其柔软蓬松，常常被用作制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Hair dropped from a <characterName id=|MopBaby|/>.
Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|NegativeOctopus|/>掉落的触手。
因其独特的触感，常常被用作制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Tentacle dropped from a <characterName id=|NegativeOctopus|/>.
Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|PinkRabbit|/>掉下的发带。
因其可爱的颜色及设计，常常被用作制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Ribbon dropped from a <characterName id=|PinkRabbit|/>.
Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|PlantSlime|/>掉落的叶子。
带着清新的气息，是用于制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Leaf dropped from a <characterName id=|PlantSlime|/>.
Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|RaijinDaughter|/>掉落的云朵。
毛茸茸的，常常被用作制作衣物的材料。
description.en:
Cloud dropped from a <characterName id=|RaijinDaughter|/>.
Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的珠子，像宝石一样。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
A gemstone-like ball collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的羽毛，闪闪发光。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
Glittering feathers collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的心脏，在不停跳动。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
A heart that never stops beating collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的爪子，十分尖锐。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
Extremely sharp claws collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上获得的毛，十分松软。
可被商人高价收购。
description.en:
Fluffy fur collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

description.zh:
可从帕鲁身上取得的优质油脂。
是制作<itemName id=|Polymer|/>时必须用到的素材。
description.en:
High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal.
Necessary for making <itemName id=|Polymer|/>.

description.zh:
植入帕鲁体内、用于更改其被动技能的植入体。
持有此道具时，可在<mapObjectName id=|OperatingTable|/>选择相应的被动技能。
description.en:
An implant embedded into a Pal's body 
to change its passive skill.
When stored in Key Items, it allows you to 
select the corresponding passive skill at 
a <mapObjectName id=|OperatingTable|/>.

description.zh: 使受伤而无法动弹的帕鲁复活的药品。
description.en: A potion that revives a Pal that has been injured and is unable to move.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
此为量产款式，只对低等级的帕鲁有效。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
在古代文明中，这种高阶帕鲁球的存在确立了与帕鲁的共存关系。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
A high-grade Sphere from an ancient civilization that secured coexistence with Pals.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
集古代文明技术之大成打造，含有世界树之力的终极帕鲁球。
description.en:
A tool that captures Pals when thrown.
An ultimate Sphere created as the pinnacle of an ancient civilization, imbued with the power of the World Tree.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
拥有超凡绝伦的性能，连超规格的帕鲁也能捕获。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Boasting incredible performance, it can capture Pals that fall outside regular standards.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
此款式可捕捉有一定强度的帕鲁。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
此款式性能极高，几乎没有帕鲁能逃得掉。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
此款式性能相当好，没多少帕鲁能逃得掉。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
此款式性能得到提升，可捕捉的帕鲁范围更广。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
较低概率可强行捕捉
别人持有的帕鲁。
description.en:
A sphere that captures Pals when thrown.
Though it has a low chance of success,
it can forcibly capture another person’s Pal.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
此款式可捕捉相当强大的帕鲁。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.

description.zh:
可扔出并捕捉帕鲁的道具。
拥有压倒性的性能，几乎可以抓住任何帕鲁。
description.en:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design.

description.zh:
画着<characterName id=|NightLady|/>的石板。
只要将其献给<mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>，
就能召唤强大的帕鲁。
description.en:
Slab depicting <characterName id=|NightLady|/>.
Offer to a <mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>
to summon a powerful Pal.

description.zh:
画着<characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>的石板。
只要将其献给<mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>，
就能召唤非常强大的<characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>[Lv 65]。
description.en:
Slab depicting <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>.
Offer to a <mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>
to summon an exceptionally powerful Lv 65 <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>之力满溢而出的石板。
只要将其献给<mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>，
就能召唤强大到令人绝望的<characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>[Lv ??]。
description.en:
Slab depicting <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>.
Offer to a <mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>
to summon an inconceivably powerful Lv ?? <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>.

description.zh:
画着<characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>的石板碎片。
通过组合可将其拼成石板。
description.en:
Fragment depicting <characterName id=|DarkMechaDragon|/>.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
画着未知图案的印章。
只要将其献给<mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>，
就能召唤强大的存在。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A seal inscribed with cryptic symbols. 
Offer to a <mapObjectName id=|Altar|/> to summon a powerful entity.

【泰拉瑞亚联动】
画着未知图案的印章。
只要将其献给<mapObjectName id=|Altar|/>，
就能召唤强大到令人绝望的存在。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A seal inscribed with cryptic symbols. 
Offer to an <mapObjectName id=|Altar|/> to summon an inconceivably powerful entity.

description.zh:
帕鲁留下的小型灵魂。
献给<mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>，可以激发隐藏的才能。
description.en:
A spirit left behind by a small Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a <mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>.

description.zh:
帕鲁留下的灵魂。
献给<mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>，可以激发隐藏的才能。
description.en:
A spirit left behind by a Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a <mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>.

description.zh:
帕鲁留下的大型灵魂。
献给<mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>，可以激发隐藏的才能。
description.en:
A spirit left behind by a large Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a <mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>.

description.zh:
饱经磨练的帕鲁留下的灵魂。
献给<mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>，可以激发隐藏的才能。
description.en:
The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a <mapObjectName id=|BuildableGoddessStatue|/>.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Crystals of PAL crystal

description.zh:
世界树能量的结晶。
可用于制作超自然的物品或建筑物。
description.en:
Crystallized energy from the World Tree.
Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Flour|/>烤制而成<itemName id=|Pan|/>。
是十分美味的主食。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Pan|/> made from baked <itemName id=|Flour|/>.
A tasty staple food.

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Flour|/>和<itemName id=|Milk|/>混合烹饪而成的料理。
食用后的一段时间内，稍微减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
A dish made by mixing <itemName id=|Flour|/> and <itemName id=|Milk|/> together then baking.
Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
采矿用的十字镐。
以帕鲁金属制造使其獲得惊人的效率。
description.en: A pickaxe for mining. It has achieved extraordinary efficiency thanks to Pal Metal.

description.zh:
采矿用的十字镐。
因为是石头做的，效率不怎么样。
description.en:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

description.zh:
采矿用的十字镐。
以金属制成，耐久度和效率都得到了提升。
description.en:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved.

description.zh:
采矿用的十字镐。
耐久度和效率均有更进一步的提升。
description.en:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Its durability and efficiency have further improved.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
将<itemName id=|Berries|/>、<itemName id=|Tomato|/>和芝士一起撒在<itemName id=|Pan|/>上后制成的料理。
食用后的一段时间内，略微提高工作速度，
且比较不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
A dish made by piling <itemName id=|Berries|/>, <itemName id=|Tomato|/> and cheese on <itemName id=|Pan|/>.
Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

description.zh:
由<itemName id=|CrudeOil|/>和金属加工制成的素材。
可在<mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace3|/>制作。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Plastic|/> created by processing <itemName id=|CrudeOil|/> and metal.
Can be produced in a <mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace3|/>.

description.zh:
以<itemName id=|Plastic|/>制成的盔甲。
在增强防御力的同时，实现了轻量化。
description.en:
Armor made of <itemName id=|Plastic|/>.
In addition to enhanced defense capabilities, its weight was also reduced.
Equipment that pushes the limits of technology.

description.zh:
经过改良的<itemName id=|PlasticArmor|/>。
能够抵御使身体冻僵的寒意。
description.en:
Improved <itemName id=|PlasticArmor|/>. 
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

description.zh:
经过改良的<itemName id=|PlasticArmor|/>。
能够抵御使身体冻僵的寒意。
description.en:
Improved <itemName id=|PlasticArmor|/>. 
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

具备傲人的耐热性能。
description.en:
Improved <itemName id=|PlasticArmor|/>.
Boasts high heat resistance.

能增加玩家的负重上限。

Increases carrying capacity.
