description.zh:
只有胜者才能获得的荣誉之证。
象征着持有者在战场上取得的优势地位。
description.en:
An emblem of glory earned through victory. 
Bearing it signifies superiority on the battlefield.

description.zh: 仿照瞅什魔的样子制作的玩偶装躯干。
description.en: A costume bodypiece modeled after Depresso.

description.zh:
不适合生吃的蘑菇。
吃了后肚子会更容易饿。
description.en:
Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw.
Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

description.zh:
加工油脂后制成的<itemName id=|Polymer|/>。
是制作枪支时必须用到的素材。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>」制作。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Polymer|/> made from refined oil. 
Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_02|/>.

description.zh:
这种植物的花朵相当鲜艳。
可用来制作<itemName id=|Opium|/>和<itemName id=|Narcotic|/>。
description.en:
A plant that blooms colorful flowers.
Can be used to make <itemName id=|Opium|/> and <itemName id=|Narcotic|/>.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Potage

description.zh:
适应性强、饱腹感好的优质作物。
不适合生食。
description.en:
A hardy and filling crop that grows in any terrain. 
Not suitable for raw consumption.

description.zh:
用油炸制<itemName id=|Potato|/>的料理。
超级上瘾，让人欲罢不能。
食用后的一段时间内，稍微减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
A dish made by deep-frying <itemName id=|Potato|/>. 
Once you start eating, you can't stop. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: PotatoSeedPotatoes

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Potato|/>的种薯。
是建造农园的必要物品。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Potato|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
需要时间才能治疗身体伤口的药水。
能够一定程度地恢复生命值。
description.en:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Restores a decent amount of Health.

description.zh:
需要时间才能治疗身体伤口的药水。
品质卓越，能够显著地恢复生命值。
description.en:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Extremely high quality, it rapidly restores HP before your eyes.

description.zh:
需要时间才能治疗身体伤口的药水。
品质佳，能够很好地恢复生命值。
description.en:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
High quality; restores a lot of Health.

description.zh:
需要时间才能治疗身体伤口的药水。
品质虽低，但是多少能恢复一些生命值。
description.en:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Low quality, but restores some Health.

description.zh:
捕食者帕鲁掉落的核心。
充满神秘能量。
description.en:
Core dropped by Predator Pals.
It is filled with mysterious energy.

description.zh:
切割神秘原木得到的板材，会发出微光。
其中寄宿着超越人智的力量，是顶级的木材。
description.en:
Planks made by processing mystical wood, emitting a faint light.
They contain power beyond human understanding and make an ideal core material.

description.zh:
为了易于使用，切割原木得到的板材。
泛用性比整根原木更高，应用范围更广。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
Planks made from processed wood for easier use.
More versatile than raw logs, with a wide variety of uses.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

description.zh:
增加填装数量，更加强劲的霰弹枪。 
拥有屈指可数的近距离DPS能力。
description.en:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.

description.zh:
增加填装数量，更加强劲的霰弹枪。 
拥有屈指可数的近距离DPS能力。
description.en:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.

description.zh:
增加填装数量，更加强劲的霰弹枪。 
拥有屈指可数的近距离DPS能力。
description.en:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.

description.zh:
增加填装数量，更加强劲的霰弹枪。 
拥有屈指可数的近距离DPS能力。
description.en:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.

description.zh:
增加填装数量，更加强劲的霰弹枪。 
拥有屈指可数的近距离DPS能力。
description.en:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
可在雪山等地找到的<itemName id=|Quartz|/>。
是制作<itemName id=|MachineParts2|/>时必须用到的素材。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Quartz|/> often found in snowy fields and similar places.
Required to create <itemName id=|MachineParts2|/>.

description.zh:
收容了驯养员心爱的帕鲁的帕鲁球。
把它还给主人吧。
description.en:
A sphere containing a breeder's precious Pal. 
It should be reunited with its owner.

description.zh: 热心肠的农民亲手制作的料理，散发着一股诱人的香气。
description.en:
A home-cooked meal from a doting farmer. 
It gives off an absolutely mouthwatering aroma.

description.zh: 依稀残留着香气的旧布，承载着佐伊的珍贵回忆。
description.en:
A worn scrap of fabric with a faint lingering scent. 
To Zoe, it's a treasured reminder of the past.

description.zh:
佐伊的万圣节服装。
她收到后一定会很开心的。
把它交给佐伊吧！
description.en:
A Halloween outfit for Zoe.
She's bound to love it,
so let's give it to her!

description.zh:
将蛋、蔬菜、蘑菇和奶油加入派皮烘烤的料理。
就算凉了依然美味可口。
食用后的一段时间内，减缓SAN值的下降速度，
且不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream. 
It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

description.zh:
只能在天坠之地发现的珍贵结晶。
帕鲁矿历经漫长岁月凝结变质而成，
呈现出彩虹般的光芒。
description.en:
A rare crystal found only in Feybreak. 
Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

description.zh:
极为罕见的魔法果实。
可以使帕鲁的阶级从☆0升到☆1。
description.en:
A magical fruit, said to be seen only on the rarest of occasions.
Raises a Pal’s rank from ☆0 to ☆1.

description.zh:
极为罕见的魔法果实。
可以使帕鲁的阶级从☆1升到☆2。
description.en:
A magical fruit, said to be seen only on the rarest of occasions.
Raises a Pal’s rank from ☆1 to ☆2.

description.zh:
极为罕见的魔法果实。
可以使帕鲁的阶级从☆2升到☆3。
description.en:
A magical fruit, said to be seen only on the rarest of occasions.
Raises a Pal’s rank from ☆2 to ☆3.

description.zh:
极为罕见的魔法果实。
可以使帕鲁的阶级从☆3升到☆4。
description.en:
A magical fruit, said to be seen only on the rarest of occasions.
Raises a Pal’s rank from ☆3 to ☆4.

description.zh:
极为罕见的魔法果实。
可以使帕鲁的阶级上升1阶。
description.en:
A magical fruit, said to be seen only on the rarest of occasions.
Raises a Pal’s rank by one.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
<itemName id=|CompoundBow|/>专用的强化箭矢。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
Enhanced arrows for shooting with 
<itemName id=|CompoundBow|/>.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|WorkBench|/>.

description.zh:
不可思议的帕鲁雕像，可在帕洛斯群岛上各处找到。
将雕像献给某座石像，就能强化玩家的能力。
description.en:
A mysterious Pal effigy that can be found all around the Palpagos Islands.
Players can enhance their abilities by offering them to a certain statue.

description.zh:
不可思议的帕鲁雕像，可在帕洛斯群岛上各处找到。

description.en:
A mysterious Pal effigy that can be found all around the Palpagos Islands.
Players can enhance their abilities by offering them to a certain statue.

description.zh:
捕捉大量帕鲁后，忽然出现在身上的神秘帕鲁雕像。
将雕像献给某座石像，就能强化玩家的能力。
description.en:
A mysterious Pal Effigy that suddenly comes into your possession when you capture many Pals.
Players can enhance their abilities by offering them to a certain statue.

description.zh:
用于修理建筑物的道具。

A <itemName id=|Salad|/> made by mixing <itemName id=|Lettuce|/> and <itemName id=|Tomato|/>.

A high-powered magnet used in advanced salvage operations. 
Its strong magnetic pull can retrieve resources and supplies from the ocean floor.

It’s easy to aim and has high firepower, making it effective for mid-range combat.

description.zh:
以帕鲁矿技术制成的神奇护盾。
一定时间不受攻击时可自动修复。
description.en:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while.

description.zh:
以帕鲁矿技术制成的神奇护盾。
一定时间不受攻击时可自动修复。
改良原型设计，提高了防御力。
description.en:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while.
The new model has been improved, enhancing its defense.

description.zh:
以帕鲁矿技术制成的神奇护盾。

description.zh:
以帕鲁矿技术制成的神奇护盾。

经过多次实验，实现了最高峰的品质。
description.en:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while.
Through repeated testing, the highest quality has been achieved.

description.zh:
以帕鲁矿技术制成的神奇护盾。
一定时间不受攻击时可自动修复。
在进一步多次实验后，结果实现了究极的品质。
description.en:
Strange shield made with Paldium technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while.
As a result of further experiments, ultimate quality has been achieved.

description.zh:
以失传的古代文明技术打造的神奇护盾。
只要一段时间没受到攻击，就会自我修复。
其性能之高，普遍认为就算是现代技术也无法重现。
description.en:
A shield created using lost ancient technology.
It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. 
Its performance is said to be impossible to reproduce in the modern era.

description.zh:
以超高科技打造的神奇护盾。

猛烈攻击周围的敌人。
description.en:
A shotgun for <characterName id=|BadCatgirl|/> to hold.
Activate its Partner Skill, and <characterName id=|BadCatgirl|/> will unleash a barrage of shotgun blasts at nearby enemies.

配合玩家的攻击进行额外射击。

Submachine gun made specifically for <characterName id=|Carbunclo|/>.
Activate its Partner Skill, and Lifmunk
will ride on your head and fire at enemies.

description.zh:
用来轻轻抓住<characterName id=|ColorfulBird|/>的手套。
发动伙伴技能后，即可抱着<characterName id=|ColorfulBird|/>，
发射爆炸蛋来进行攻击。
description.en:
Gloves for gently holding <characterName id=|ColorfulBird|/>.
Activate its Partner Skill to hold <characterName id=|ColorfulBird|/>
and use it to fire explosive eggs.

If <characterName id=|DreamDemon|/> is in your team,
it will stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|DrillGame|/>的决胜头带。

能够高效率钻凿岩石。
description.en:

Activate its Partner Skill to make <characterName id=|DrillGame|/> spin at high speed, allowing it to more efficiently drill through rock.

<characterName id=|FlowerRabbit|/>的项圈。

一直待在场上，并自动拾取附近的道具。

description.zh:
<characterName id=|LeafMomonga|/>的背带。
持有此道具时，<characterName id=|LeafMomonga|/>会在玩家陷入濒死状态时
通过疗愈能力让玩家复活。
description.en:
Harness for <characterName id=|LeafMomonga|/>. 
<characterName id=|LeafMomonga|/> can use its healing power to revive the player when incapacitated.

Grants the ability to generate a barrier that blocks incoming attacks.

猛烈扫射周围的敌人。

Activate its Partner Skill, and <characterName id=|Monkey|/> will enter gunner mode
and begin shooting at nearby enemies.

Rocket launcher for launching <characterName id=|Penguin|/>.
Activate its Partner Skill to fire Pengullet and damage enemies. 
After firing, <characterName id=|Penguin|/> will become incapacitated.

description.zh:
持有此道具时，
即可骑乘<characterName id=|Yeti|/>。
description.en: Saddle for safely riding <characterName id=|Yeti|/>.

description.zh:

description.zh:
用烈阳金属锭制造的突击步枪。
在维持泛用性的前提下，能够装填威力更大的弹药。
description.en:
An assault rifle made from Soralite Ingots.
It has been enhanced to handle powerful ammo while maintaining its versatility.

<itemName id=|SkyAssaultRifle|/>使用的弹药。

用烈阳金属锭制造的<itemName id=|BeamSword|/>。
高能光刃能够瞬间将面前的对手一刀两断。
description.en:
A <itemName id=|BeamSword|/> made from Soralite Ingots. 
A close-range weapon that instantly cuts targets using its high-output energy blade.

用烈阳金属锭打造的弓。
射击初速和贯通力得到大幅提升，可实现高精度远程射击。
description.en:
A bow crafted from Soralite Ingots.
With greatly enhanced initial velocity and piercing power, this high-precision weapon excels at ranged combat.

[WIP] Description not finalized.
Ammo for the <itemName id=|SkyShotgun|/>, <itemName id=|SkyGrenadeLauncher|/>, and similar weapons.

description.zh:
只有在天阳乡才能开采到的稀有矿石。
密度极高的母岩有着神秘的花纹，其中蕴含着光辉。
description.en:
A rare ore produced only in Sunreach.
Within its host rock of overwhelming density resides a mysterious pattern and radiance.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en:
[WIP] Description not finalized.
Ammo for the <itemName id=|SkySubmachineGun|/>, <itemName id=|SkyAssaultRifle|/>, and similar weapons.

description.zh:
用烈阳金属锭制造的霰弹枪。
极近距离下能发挥出霸道的火力，特殊的弹匣还增强了其持久作战能力。
description.en:
A shotgun made from Soralite Ingots.
It delivers overwhelming firepower at close range, and its special magazine also provides high sustained combat capability.

经过改良的弹匣和弹药强化了其压制力。
description.en:

Its improved magazine and ammunition enhance its suppression power.

description.zh:
从沉睡在天阳乡的矿石中提取出的古代文明金属材料。
是打造高级装备和建筑物时不可或缺的罕见加工素材。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|AncientBlastFurnace|/>」冶炼。
description.en:
An ancient metal refined from ore that slumbers in Sunreach. 
A rare processed material, forming the foundation of high-grade equipment and structures.
Can be refined at <mapObjectName id=|AncientBlastFurnace|/>.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
可在近战时发挥作用的<itemName id=|Spear|/>。
射程很长，可在战斗时保持一定距离。
description.en:
Useful for close-range combat.
Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

description.zh:
可在近战时发挥作用的<itemName id=|Spear|/>。
用金属制成，提升了攻击力。
射程很长，可在战斗时保持一定距离。
description.en:
Useful for close-range combat.
The metal tip give it an increased attack power.
Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

description.zh:
可在近战时发挥作用的<itemName id=|Spear|/>。
用优质金属制成，提升了攻击力。
射程很长，可在战斗时保持一定距离。
description.en:
Useful for close-range combat.
The high-quality metal tip give it an increased attack power.
Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

description.zh:
莉莉爱用的长矛。
她会用它来制裁蔑视帕鲁的人。
description.en:
The spear cherished by Lily.
Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

description.zh:
莉莉爱用的长矛，经过了强化。
她会用它把蔑视帕鲁的人捅成筛子。
description.en:
An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear. 
Pierces those who neglect their Pals.

description.zh:
莉莉爱用的长矛，经过了强化。
她会用它把蔑视帕鲁的人捅成筛子。
description.en:
An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear. 
Pierces those who neglect their Pals.

description.zh:
莉莉爱用的长矛。
她会用它来制裁蔑视帕鲁的人。
description.en:
The spear cherished by Lily.
Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

description.zh:
经改造后的<characterName id=|QueenBee|/>法杖，专供人类使用。 
能感受到外露的女王霸气。
description.en:
A spear made from <characterName id=|QueenBee|/>'s staff, altered for human use.
It is imbued with <characterName id=|QueenBee|/>'s indomitable spirit.

description.zh:
经改造后的<characterName id=|SoldierBee|/>长矛，专供人类使用。
能感受到真诚的忠贞之心。
description.en:
A spear made from the <characterName id=|SoldierBee|/>'s spear, altered for human use.
Can feel a sincere loyalty.

description.zh:
可同时发射大量帕鲁球的新型发射器。
可用来捕捉成群的帕鲁。
description.en:
A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres.
It can easily capture a herd of Pals.

description.zh:
用于发射帕鲁球的发射器。
用它就能捕捉到更远处的帕鲁。
description.en:
A launcher that fires spheres.
It can capture Pals from a greater distance.

description.zh:
装备后能在帕鲁球上增添曲线旋转。
容易从死角命中帕鲁，并提高捕获力。
description.en:
Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory. 
It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power.

description.zh:
装备后能在帕鲁球上增添滑球旋转。
帕鲁球能以较大角度急剧弯曲，
更容易出其不意，并提高捕获力。
description.en:
Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere. 
The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power.

description.zh:
装备后会增加帕鲁球的重量，
虽然投掷距离会缩短，但能提高捕获力。
description.en: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

description.zh:
装备后帕鲁球会自动追踪帕鲁，
并且提高捕获力。
description.en: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power.

description.zh:
装备后会帕鲁球的投掷距离会增加，
能够精准锁定帕鲁，并提高捕获力。
description.en: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

description.zh:
装备后会帕鲁球的投掷距离会大幅增加，
能够精准锁定帕鲁，并提高捕获力。
description.en: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

description.zh:
将野菜和蘑菇包裹在皮中油炸的料理。
酥脆爽口，令人愉悦。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> +10%，
且减缓SAN值的下降速度。
description.en:
A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them. 
The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK|/> by 10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
由<itemName id=|Chromium|/>和<itemName id=|RainbowCrystal|/>加工制成的合金。
是用于制作先进装备或建筑的材料。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace4|/>」冶炼。
description.en:
An alloy of <itemName id=|Chromium|/> and <itemName id=|RainbowCrystal|/>. 
Used for building advanced equipment and structures.
Can be refined at <mapObjectName id=|BlastFurnace4|/>.

description.zh:
玩家服用此药物 
即可重置属性点。 
帕鲁服用不会产生任何作用。
description.en:
A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed.
It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.

description.zh:
以<itemName id=|StealIngot|/>制成的盔甲。
有着惊人的防御力，但是十分沉重。
description.en:
Armor made from <itemName id=|StealIngot|/>.
High defense, but extremely heavy.
Equipment for a hero, it exudes bravery.

description.zh:
经过改良的<itemName id=|StealArmor|/>。
能够抵御使身体冻僵的寒意。
description.en:
Improved <itemName id=|StealArmor|/>.
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

用于制作帕鲁金属制武器或防具的素材。
将帕鲁矿成分用于铸造合金，因此强度更高。
description.en:
A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor. 
Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Stew

description.zh:
将来自寒冷地带的鹿肉和蔬菜一同熬煮而成的炖菜。
肉质鲜嫩，与细腻的甜味完美交融。
食用后的一段时间内，比较不容易感到饥饿。
description.en:
Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment.
The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness.
Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

description.zh:
用<itemName id=|Carrot|/>和<itemName id=|Onion|/>炒制的料理。
轻松享用美味蔬菜的好方法。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> +10%，
且略微提高工作速度。
description.en:
A dish made by stir-frying <itemName id=|Carrot|/> and <itemName id=|Onion|/>. 
A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE|/> by 10% for a period of time.

description.zh:
建筑物及物品的材料。
可通过开采石头获得。
description.en:
Material for structures and items.
Can be obtained by mining rocks.

description.zh:
连射能力优异的冲锋枪。
轻巧灵活，适合近距离战斗。
description.en:
A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. 
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

description.zh:
连射能力优异的冲锋枪。
轻巧灵活，适合近距离战斗。
description.en:
A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. 
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

连射能力优异的冲锋枪。
轻巧灵活，适合近距离战斗。

A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. 
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. 
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

连射能力优异的冲锋枪。
轻巧灵活，适合近距离战斗。
description.en:
A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. 
It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

description.zh:
可在火山等地找到的<itemName id=|Sulfur|/>。
是制作<itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/>时必须用到的素材。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Sulfur|/> that can be found in volcanoes and such.
Necessary for making <itemName id=|Gunpowder2|/>.

description.zh:
饮用后能在一段时间内抑制饥饿感的<itemName id=|Supplement|/>。
浓缩了多种营养成分、风味浓郁，能防止在冒险途中感到饥饿。
description.en:
A nutrient-rich <itemName id=|Supplement|/> that prevents hunger for a period of time. 
A concentrated, flavorful blend of nutrients ideal for long journeys.

description.zh:
可从<characterName id=|SweetsSheep|/>身上取得的棉花糖。
吃起来轻盈甜美，入口即化。
description.en:
Cotton candy collected from <characterName id=|SweetsSheep|/>.
Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

description.zh:
可从<characterName id=|SweetsSheep_Ground|/>身上取得的焦糖味棉花糖。
吃起来甜美丝滑，入口即化。
description.en:
Caramel cotton candy collected from <characterName id=|SweetsSheep_Ground|/>.
Its fluffy sweetness melts away in your mouth.

description.zh:
近距离战斗用的<itemName id=|Sword|/>。
锋利无比！但需要靠近敌人攻击，相当危险。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Sword|/> for close-range combat.
The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure.
Requires <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/> to craft.

description.zh:
近距离战斗用的<itemName id=|Sword|/>。
锋利无比！但需要靠近敌人攻击，相当危险。
description.en:
<itemName id=|Sword|/> for close-range combat.
The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure.
Requires <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/> to craft.

<itemName id=|Sword|/> for close-range combat.
The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure.
Requires <mapObjectName id=|WeaponFactory_Dirty_01|/> to craft.

description.zh:
书上写着某种高端技术。
使用后，可获得少量科技点。
description.en:
A book that contains secrets of amazing technology.
Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

description.zh:
书上写着十分先进的技术。
使用后，可获得科技点。
description.en:
A book that contains secrets of cutting-edge technology.
Use it to obtain Technology Points.

description.zh:
书上写着这个时代没有的技术。
使用后，可获得大量科技点。
description.en:
A book that contains secrets of technology beyond current day comprehension.
Use it to obtain lots of Technology Points.

description.zh:
含有巨大热能的高温反应核心，
用于尖端设备的动力机关。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>」制作。
description.en:
A high-temperature reaction core containing vast thermal energy.
Used as a power component in advanced devices.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|Factory_Hard_03|/>.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
色彩鲜艳的食材，可以丰富菜肴的颜色。
富含番茄红素，对身体有益。
description.en:
A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish.
Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Tomato|/>的种子。
是建造农园的必要物品。
可从商人处购买。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Tomato|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

description.zh:
照亮夜晚的黑暗，为人驱逐寒意。
可勉强用于近战。
description.en:
Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm.
Can also be used for close range combat in a pinch.

description.zh: 用于打开上锁宝箱的钥匙。
description.en: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

description.zh: 用于打开上锁宝箱的钥匙。
description.en: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

description.zh: 用于打开上锁宝箱的钥匙。
description.en: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

description.zh:
记载着宝藏位置的陈旧地图。
使用后可在地图上标记出藏宝地点。
description.en:
A weathered map showing where treasure lies. 
Using it places a marker on your map.

description.zh:
记载着宝藏位置的陈旧地图。
使用后可在地图上标记出藏宝地点。
description.en:
A weathered map showing where treasure lies. 
Using it places a marker on your map.

description.zh:
记载着宝藏位置的陈旧地图。
使用后可在地图上标记出藏宝地点。
description.en:
A weathered map showing where treasure lies. 
Using it places a marker on your map.

description.zh:
记载着宝藏位置的陈旧地图。
使用后可在地图上标记出藏宝地点。
description.en:
A weathered map showing where treasure lies. 
Using it places a marker on your map.

description.zh:
记载着宝藏位置的陈旧地图。
使用后可在地图上标记出藏宝地点。
description.en:
A weathered map showing where treasure lies. 
Using it places a marker on your map.

description.zh:
<characterName id=|FlowerPrince|/>的器官，
能够保护自身不受自己放出的腐雾伤害。
它能过滤腐雾，防止毒素进入体内。
description.en:
An organ that protects <characterName id=|FlowerPrince|/> from the corrosive mist it emits.
It filters and neutralizes the corrosive mist.

description.zh:
从<characterName id=|Mothman|/>的体表采集到的纤维。
能减缓爆炸时受到的冲击。
description.en:
Fibers taken from the surface of a <characterName id=|Mothman|/>’s body.
It can reduce the impact of explosions.

description.zh:
它的存在感自带威严。
不论是气味还是形状都象征着它的伟大。
description.en:
It has an intimidating presence.
Whether it's the scent or the shape, this is the mark of a heavyweight.

description.zh:
动物的粪便。
可作为肥料使用，是生态系统必不可少的存在。
有令人在意的刺鼻气味。
description.en:
Animal dung.
An essential part of any ecosystem, and can even be used as fertilizer.
It smells awful, to say the least.

description.zh:
内部会与持有者身体产生共鸣的不可思议的箱子。
带在身上，饰品栏位就会增加1格。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A mysterious box whose interior synchronizes with the owner's body. 
Accessory equipment slots increase by 1.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
内部会与持有者身体产生共鸣的不可思议的箱子。
带在身上，能让饰品栏位进一步增加1格。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A mysterious box whose interior synchronizes with the owner's body. 
Accessory equipment slots further increase by 1.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
能让人多装备一件武器的挂套。
带在身上，武器栏位就会增加1格。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A holster that allows an additional weapon to be equipped.
While in possession, it increases weapon equip slots by 1.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
能让人多装备一件武器的挂套。
带在身上，能让武器栏位进一步增加1格。
只需携带一个就足够了。
description.en:
A holster that lets you equip additional weapons.
When in inventory, adds an extra weapon slot.
Carrying one is enough.

description.zh:
持有此道具时，能够通过撬锁打开
需要<itemName id=|TreasureBoxKey01|/>才能打开的宝箱。
即使多次使用也不会坏。
description.en: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a <itemName id=|TreasureBoxKey01|/>.

description.zh:
持有此道具时，能够通过撬锁打开
需要<itemName id=|TreasureBoxKey02|/>才能打开的宝箱。
即使多次使用也不会坏。
description.en: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a <itemName id=|TreasureBoxKey02|/>.

description.zh:
持有此道具时，能够通过撬锁打开
需要<itemName id=|TreasureBoxKey03|/>才能打开的宝箱。
即使多次使用也不会坏。
description.en: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a <itemName id=|TreasureBoxKey03|/>.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
可从带毒的帕鲁身上获得的素材。
是<itemName id=|Arrow_Poison|/>等的素材。
description.en:
Material obtainable from poisonous Pals.
Can be used to make <itemName id=|Arrow_Poison|/> and more.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: en Text

description.zh:
用于水上建造的工具。
可以在水面上放置地基。
description.en:
Construction kit that allows foundations
to be placed on water.

description.zh:
原始的远距离攻击武器。
因为是东拼西凑而成的，威力较弱。
description.en:
Primitive long range weapon.
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

description.zh:
原始的远距离攻击武器。
因为是东拼西凑而成的，威力较弱。
description.en:
Primitive long range weapon.
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

description.zh:
原始的远距离攻击武器。
因为是东拼西凑而成的，威力较弱。
description.en:
Primitive long range weapon.
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

description.zh:
原始的远距离攻击武器。
因为是东拼西凑而成的，威力较弱。
description.en:
Primitive long range weapon.
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

description.zh:
原始的远距离攻击武器。
因为是东拼西凑而成的，威力较弱。
description.en:
Primitive long range weapon.
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

description.zh:
解读磨损的设计图后，复现出来的骨笛。
仿佛能传至天涯海角的澄澈音色，将会唤醒它吧。
守护盟约的，汪洋之主。
description.en: A bone flute recreated by deciphering a Faded Schematic. Its clear tone, echoing endlessly beyond the horizon, will likely call forth the oath-keeper, the Legendary Ocean King.

description.zh:
能感受到不可思议的力量的骨片。
集中精神倾听，能隐约听到一丝声音。
温柔地周而复始的波浪之声。
description.en:
A mysterious bone fragment.
If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard.
A sound of gentle, rhythmic waves.

description.zh:
能感受到不可思议的力量的骨片。
集中精神倾听，能隐约听到一丝声音。
某日曾经造访过的静寂之声。
description.en:
A mysterious bone fragment.
If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard.
A sound of silence once encountered.

description.zh:
能感受到不可思议的力量的骨片。
集中精神倾听，能隐约听到一丝声音。
转瞬即逝的水泡破裂之声。​​
description.en:
A mysterious bone fragment.
If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard.
A sound of fleeting water bubbles popping.

description.zh:
能感受到不可思议的力量的骨片。
集中精神倾听，能隐约听到一丝声音。
安稳平静的海风之声。
description.en:
A mysterious bone fragment.
If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard.
The sound of a gentle sea breeze.

description.zh:
可制作各式菜肴的基础食材。
<itemName id=|Wheat|/>正是最基础的农作物。
description.en:
An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes.
<itemName id=|Wheat|/> is a common crop in many parts of the world.

description.zh:
可培育出<itemName id=|Wheat|/>的种子。
是建造农园的必要物品。
可从商人处购买。
description.en:
Seeds that produce <itemName id=|Wheat|/>.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

description.zh: 强化了近战性能的光束武器。能将压缩的能量以扩散光束的形式发射出去。
description.en:
A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|WidePenetrateShotgun|/>使用的弹药。
可在「<mapObjectName id=|AncientWorkBench|/>」制作。
description.en:
Ammo for the <itemName id=|WidePenetrateShotgun|/>.
Can be crafted at <mapObjectName id=|AncientWorkBench|/>.

description.zh: 强化了近战性能的光束武器。能将压缩的能量以扩散光束的形式发射出去。
description.en:
A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

description.zh: 强化了近战性能的光束武器。能将压缩的能量以扩散光束的形式发射出去。

A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

description.zh: 强化了近战性能的光束武器。能将压缩的能量以扩散光束的形式发射出去。
description.en:
A specialized beam weapon for close-range combat.
It fires compressed energy in a wide, scattering blast.

description.zh: zh-hans text
description.en: Wine

description.zh:
背在背上即可飞行的翼装。
消耗<itemName id=|WingGlider_Fuel|/>获得推进力。
description.en:
A portable glider that enables flight. 
Consumes <itemName id=|WingGlider_Fuel|/> to propel the user through the skies.

description.zh: <itemName id=|WingGlider|/>飞行所需的能源。
description.en: The fuel required to power the <itemName id=|WingGlider|/>.

description.zh:
制造建筑物及物品的材料。
主要通过伐木获得。
description.en:
Material for structures and items.
Can be obtained by cutting trees.

description.zh:
在极限环境下活过漫长岁月的树木的皮。
即使只有薄薄一层，也能从中感到无限的生命力。
description.en:
The bark of a tree that has lived for many years in extreme environments.
Even the thin bark evokes a sense of boundless vitality.

description.zh:
精挑细选的优质木材。
砍伐生长在沙漠、火山、雪山等
极端环境下的树木可以获得。
description.en: High-quality wood carefully selected from sturdy trees grown in harsh environments such as deserts, volcanic regions, and snowy mountains.

description.zh:
含有世界树力量的稀有木材。
如果不是技术熟练的工匠甚至无法加工它。
description.en:
Rare wood imbued with the power of the World Tree.
Only skilled craftsmen are able to process it.

description.zh:
从羊型帕鲁身上获取的素材。
是制作床及<itemName id=|Cloth|/>的必要物品。
description.en:
Material sheared from sheep Pals.
A necessity for creating bedding, <itemName id=|Cloth|/> and more.

description.zh:
记载着<uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Collection|/>精髓的珍贵书籍。
如果让帕鲁阅读，
可永久提升<uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Collection|/>适应性1级。
description.en:
A rare book written about the secrets of <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Collection|/>. 
Allowing a Pal to read it permanently increases their <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Collection|/> affinity by +1.

description.zh:
记载着<uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Cool|/>精髓的珍贵书籍。
如果让帕鲁阅读，
可永久提升<uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Cool|/>适应性1级。
description.en:
A rare book written about the secrets of <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_Cool|/>.

description.en:

description.zh:
记载着<uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_MonsterFarm|/>精髓的珍贵书籍。
如果让帕鲁阅读，
可永久提升<uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_MonsterFarm|/>适应性1级。
description.en:
A rare book written about the secrets of <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_MonsterFarm|/>. 
Allowing a Pal to read it permanently increases their <uiCommon id=|COMMON_WORK_SUITABILITY_MonsterFarm|/> affinity by +1.

description.zh:
充满世界树能量的圣水。
它能净化万物，并唤醒潜藏的力量。
喝下后一定时间内，世界树区域的树木和矿石不会在接近时消失。
description.en:
Sacred water brimming with the energy of the World Tree.
It purifies all things and awakens latent powers.
When consumed, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached for a period of time.

description.zh:
<itemName id=|SkyIslandOre|/>和<itemName id=|WorldTreeOre|/>熔炼而成的至高合金。
是古代文明技术和世界树之力的结晶，极其珍贵。
打造最高阶的装备和建筑时不可或缺的材料。
description.en:
An indomitable alloy created by fusing <itemName id=|SkyIslandOre|/> and <itemName id=|WorldTreeOre|/>.
A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree.
It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

description.zh:
长年以来从世界树逸出的能量一点一滴凝成的结晶。
一旦被未受加护者触碰，一瞬间就会化作尘埃。
能成功驾驭这种脆弱，才能登上古代技术的最高峰。
description.en:
Energy leaking from the World Tree that has crystallized after many years. 
Those without protection who touch it will instantly rust and decay.
Only those who can master its delicacy can reach the pinnacle of ancient technology.

description.zh:
古代文明建筑或物品的碎片。
已经彻底朽坏，没有任何能量残留。
description.en:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
Completely decayed, with no energy remaining.

description.zh:
古代文明建筑或物品的碎片。
尽管保存状态不差，但几乎没有能量残留。
description.en:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In decent condition, but almost no energy remains.

description.zh:
古代文明建筑或物品的碎片。
保存状态良好，能够感受到其中的能量流动。
description.en:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In good condition, and you can feel the energy flowing.

description.zh:
古代文明建筑或物品的碎片。
保存状态极佳，内部透出微微的光。
description.en:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In very good condition, light is leaking from within.

description.zh:
古代文明建筑或物品的碎片。
整体充满能量，散发光辉。
description.en:
Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization.
In very good condition, light is leaking from within.
It is overflowing with energy and emitting a glow.

description.zh:
将面条与蔬菜和肉一起翻炒的料理。
浓郁的调味与厚实的肉块完美搭配。
食用后的一段时间内，<uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_Attack|/> +20%。
description.en:
A dish made by stir-frying noodles with vegetables and meat. 
The rich seasoning pairs perfectly with the thick cuts of meat. Eating it will increase your <uiCommon id=|COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_Attack|/> by 20% for a period of time.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
以<itemName id=|YakushimaIngot001|/>制成的盔甲。
蕴含神圣的力量，可减轻来自【泰拉瑞亚联动】怪物的伤害。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
Armor forged from <itemName id=|YakushimaIngot001|/>. 
Enveloped in divine power, it lessens damage from [Tides of Terraria] monsters.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
传说这把剑是<characterName id=|KendoFrog|/>从遥远的国度带回来的。
至于原因嘛，我们完全不知道……
每次挥舞都会射出弹跳的猫咪弹攻击敌人。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria]
According to the legend, this sword was brought back from a distant land by <characterName id=|KendoFrog|/>.
Why? We have no idea...
Fires a bouncing cat projectile with each swing to attack enemies.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
挥舞时，剑身会释放翠绿冲击波的奇妙之剑。
虽然是近战武器，但也能攻击远处的敌人。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
This curious sword releases vibrant green shockwaves with each strike, allowing you to hit enemies from afar despite being a melee weapon.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
剑身呈七彩色的神秘之剑。
挥舞时可召唤受祝福之剑共同作战。
最多可召唤9把。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A mystical sword with a rainbow-colored blade. 
Wielding it lets you summon up to nine blessed swords to fight alongside you.

【泰拉瑞亚联动】
闪耀着金色光辉的神圣之剑。
挥舞时会向自身周围释放冲击波。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A sacred sword that gleams with golden light.
Swinging it unleashes shockwaves around you.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
由<itemName id=|YakushimaIngot002|/>锻造而来的<itemName id=|YakushimaBlade|/>。
每次挥舞都能射出会弹跳的猫咪弹攻击敌人。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A legendary <itemName id=|YakushimaBlade|/> forged from <itemName id=|YakushimaIngot002|/>. 
Swinging it launches cat projectiles that ricochet and attack foes.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
利用未知能量驱动的大型枪支。
有66%的概率不消耗弹药，并且每隔一段时间发射能够追踪敌人并爆炸的导弹。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria]
A powerful gun fueled by unknown energy.
Fires homing missiles at regular intervals that track enemies and explode on impact.
Has a 66% chance to not consume ammo when firing.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
以<itemName id=|YakushimaIngot001|/>制成的头部防具。
蕴含神圣的力量，可提升「<itemName id=|YakushimaBlade|/>」「<itemName id=|YakushimaBlade004|/>」「<itemName id=|YakushimaBlade002|/>」「<itemName id=|YakushimaBlade005|/>」造成的伤害。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
Helmet forged from <itemName id=|YakushimaIngot001|/>. 
Enveloped in divine power, it increases damage dealt by <itemName id=|YakushimaBlade|/>, <itemName id=|YakushimaBlade004|/>, <itemName id=|YakushimaBlade002|/>, and <itemName id=|YakushimaBlade005|/>.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
可以感受到<characterName id=|RAID_YakushimaBoss002|/>不祥的力量。
由于是相当稀少之物，拥有之人少之又少。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
Pulsing with <characterName id=|RAID_YakushimaBoss002|/>'s sinister energy. 
A rarity only the most fortunate may obtain.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
蕴含神圣之力的材料。
可用于制作泰拉瑞亚的各类道具。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A sacred material infused with divine energy. 
Can be used to create a variety of Terraria items.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
<characterName id=|RAID_YakushimaBoss002|/>掉落的蕴含强大力量的材料。
散发着宛如月光的银辉。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A material exuding immense power, dropped by <characterName id=|RAID_YakushimaBoss002|/>. 
Radiates a soft, moon-like glow.

description.zh:
【泰拉瑞亚联动】
散发出七彩光辉的神秘提灯。
举起此提灯后，它会发射能够追踪敌人并进行多次攻击的光弹。
description.en:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A lantern that radiates a rainbow-hued light. 
Holding it aloft releases homing light projectiles that strike enemies multiple times.
